candidates.rationale: Rictor의 mTORC2 복합체 형성을 선택적으로 억제하면서 AKT/FoxO3a 축을 활성화하여 근육단백질 합성과 자가포식을 동시에 촉진. 기존 라팔로그의 비선택성 문제를 해결하고 ferroptosis 억제로 근육세포 생존성 향상. 술폰아마이드 기반 구조로 경구 생물이용률 우수.
candidates.mechanism: Selective Rictor/mTORC2 inhibitor with dual activity: (1) Rictor binding pocket interaction blocks mTORC2-mediated AKT S473 phosphorylation feedback, paradoxically enhancing AKT T308 phosphorylation via upstream signaling; (2) FoxO3a nuclear translocation increased, promoting autophagy and mitophagy; (3) Ferroptosis suppression via GPX4 indirect stabilization; (4) AMPK-mTOR axis rebalancing
candidates.advantages: 선택적 mTORC2 억제로 mTORC1 기반 단백질 합성 유지, 기존 라팔로그보다 근력/기능 개선 우수, 장기 투여 시 대사 부작용 최소화, 다약제 병용 환자에서 CYP3A4 상호작용 낮음, 경구 흡수 우수 (LogP 3.2-3.8 범위)
candidates.safety_concerns: 장기 ferroptosis 억제로 철 축적 가능성, 자가포식 과활성화로 인한 근육분해 역설 (용량 의존적), 혈당 조절 이상 가능 (인슐린 신호 변화), 신장 독성 모니터링 필요

candidates.rationale: Rictor와 상호작용하는 신규 푸린 스캐폴드로 PI3K/AKT/mTOR 신호 조절. NF-κB 경로 억제로 염증성 근감소증 해결 (sarcopenic obesity 환자의 만성 염증 타겟). Necroptosis 억제로 근손상 방지하고 미토파지 유도로 mitochondrial quality control 개선.
candidates.mechanism: Dual Rictor inhibition + NF-κB suppression: (1) ATP-competitive binding to Rictor kinase domain, stabilizing inactive conformation; (2) IκB kinase (IKK) indirect inhibition via mTORC2-NF-κB axis coupling disruption; (3) RIPK1/RIPK3 complex destabilization preventing necroptosis; (4) Enhanced mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α/SIRT1 pathway; (5) Improved insulin sensitivity through GLUT4 translocation
candidates.advantages: 이중 표적 활동으로 사르코페닉 비만 환자의 염증-근손상 악순환 차단, 미토콘드리아 기능 회복으로 지구력 및 근력 동시 향상, 기존 NSAIDs보다 안전한 염증 억제, 경구 생물이용률 60-70% 예상, 노인 환자의 다약제 병용에서 약물상호작용 최소화
candidates.safety_concerns: 장기 NF-κB 억제로 면역 기능 저하 우려 (감염 위험), Necroptosis 완전 억제 시 세포 사멸 부전으로 암 발생 가능성 제기, 간독성 모니터링 필요 (특히 CYP3A4 기질), 신경독성 평가 필수

candidates.rationale: Rictor 억제와 동시에 AMPK 활성화를 유도하는 dual-action 분자. mTORC2 피드백 루프 차단으로 근단백질 분해 감소, AMPK 활성화로 에너지 대사 개선 및 자가포식 촉진. 노인 환자의 미토콘드리아 기능 저하 복구 및 인슐린 민감도 향상으로 사르코페닉 비만 치료.
candidates.mechanism: Rictor/mTORC2 inhibitor with AMPK activator properties: (1) Direct Rictor binding reduces mTORC2-dependent AKT/PKC activation; (2) LKB1-AMPK pathway activation via SIRT1-mediated deacetylation; (3) Increased NAD+ metabolism and mitochondrial oxidative capacity; (4) Enhanced autophagy-lysosome flux via ULK1 phosphorylation; (5) Suppression of ferroptosis through XCT upregulation; (6) Improved sarcopenia-obesity metabolic profile through reduced visceral adiposity
candidates.advantages: 진정한 dual-mechanism으로 근질량과 기능 동시 향상 (기존 단일 표적 실패 극복), AMPK 활성화로 전신 대사 건강 개선, 노인 환자의 장기 투여에서 대사독성 최소화, 뮤스카린 수용체 상호작용 회피로 안전성 우수, 경구 생물이용률 우수 (LogP 3.5)
candidates.safety_concerns: 과도한 AMPK 활성화로 인한 저혈당 위험 (특히 제2형 당뇨 환자), 강력한 자가포식 유도로 myonuclei 손실 가능성 (용량-시간 의존적 모니터링 필수), mTORC1 억제 부작용 (면역 기능, 상처 치유 지연), 신장 독성 및 단백뇨 모니터링 필수, CYP3A4/2C9 기질로 약물상호작용 가능

candidates.rationale: CCN1/CYR61의 integrin-binding motif (RGD-유사)를 모방하는 peptidomimetic 설계. AMPK/PGC-1α 및 Akt/mTOR 경로를 동시 활성화하여 근육 질량과 미토콘드리아 기능을 함께 개선. 구조적으로 resveratrol의 다중경로 활성화 특성을 유지하면서 경구 생체이용률을 향상.
candidates.mechanism: CCN1 matricellular signaling through integrin α6β1/α9β1 engagement → simultaneous AMPK activation (PGC-1α-mediated mitochondrial biogenesis) and Akt-mTOR pathway stimulation (protein synthesis) + NF-κB/MuRF1 pathway inhibition via SIRT1 deacetylase activation. Dual effect on muscle mass accretion and oxidative capacity (function preservation).
candidates.advantages: Oral small molecule with peptidomimetic features; addresses mass+function duality through dual AMPK/mTOR engagement; predicted LogP 3.2 suitable for elderly absorption; minimal CYP450 metabolism (reduced drug-drug interactions vs. resveratrol); long half-life profile compatible with once-daily dosing; sarcopenic obesity benefit through PGC-1α-driven lipid oxidation.
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target integrin engagement (thrombosis risk at high doses); chronic mTOR stimulation may increase cancer risk—requires dose optimization and biomarker monitoring; mild GI upset from peptidomimetic structure; long-term PGC-1α activation could impair glucose homeostasis in diabetic elderly.

candidates.rationale: FGF receptor-p38 MAPK 경로의 비고전적 활성화제로 설계. CCN1-mediated FGF signaling을 강화하면서 myostatin/ActRII 억제 모티프(arginine-rich peptide domain)를 통합. Bimagrumab의 antibody 장점(특이성)과 소분자의 이점(생체이용률, 경구성)을 결합.
candidates.mechanism: Dual modulation: (1) FGF-FGFR engagement enhancing CCN1-dependent fibroblast growth factor receptor signaling → p38 MAPK → muscle fiber hypertrophy via ERK1/2 cross-talk; (2) ActRII antagonism (arginine-rich motif) preventing myostatin/activin A signaling → relief of myogenic inhibition. Synergistic effect on myogenic differentiation (function) + hypertrophy (mass).
candidates.advantages: First-in-class FGF-mimetic with ActRII dual antagonism; oral bioavailability superior to bimagrumab (antibody); reduced immunogenicity vs. biologics; selective for muscle tissue via FGF receptor isoform targeting (predicted 50-fold selectivity for FGFR1c over neuronal receptors); compatible with NSAIDs/statins (minimal CYP interactions); superior pharmacokinetics for elderly compliance.
candidates.safety_concerns: FGF pathway activation associated with fibrosis risk—requires careful dose titration and fibrosis biomarker monitoring (P1NP, PICP); potential angiogenic effects (cardiovascular concerns in elderly with comorbidities); ActRII antagonism may affect bone homeostasis (fracture risk in osteoporotic patients); off-target FGFR4 activation could impair metabolic flexibility.

candidates.rationale: SIRT1/PGC-1α 경로 강화 및 동시에 Notch signaling 조절을 통한 근육 위성세포(satellite cell) 활성화. Autophagy-lysosome 경로 유도로 sarcopenic obesity에서 동시 근육 재생 및 지방 감소. Resveratrol의 NAD+ 부스팅 효과를 개선된 바이오가용성과 함께 제공.
candidates.mechanism: SIRT1 direct activation via NAD+-independent allosteric binding → deacetylation of PGC-1α (mitochondrial biogenesis), FoxO3a (autophagy induction), and NF-κB (MuRF1 suppression). Notch pathway modulation (via tryptophan metabolites) enhances satellite cell proliferation without terminal differentiation block. Integrated effect: mitochondrial renewal (function) + autophagy-mediated proteostasis improvement + new myofiber formation (mass recovery).
candidates.advantages: Tripartite mechanism addressing sarcopenia pathophysiology (metabolic dysfunction + loss of regenerative capacity + proteolysis); oral bioavailability 40-60% (resveratrol ~20%); predicted plasma half-life 8-12 hours (suitable for elderly); NAD+-independent SIRT1 activation avoids metabolic competition; sarcopenic obesity benefit through lipophagy promotion; no documented CYP450 inhibition.
candidates.safety_concerns: Chronic autophagy induction may impair cell survival in metabolically compromised tissues (cardiomyocytes)—requires cardio-safety monitoring; Notch activation could promote cancer stem cell features (contraindicated in cancer survivors); potential systemic metabolic shifts (hypoglycemia risk in diabetics on metformin); long-term mitochondrial biogenesis without energy demand could lead to futile cycling.

candidates.rationale: miRNA-29는 섬유화 조절과 근육 단백질 분해에 중요한 역할을 수행합니다. 본 화합물은 SIRT1/PGC-1α 경로를 활성화하면서 동시에 NF-κB/MuRF1 신호전달을 억제하여 근질량 증가와 근기능 개선을 동시에 달성합니다. 이소프로필페닐 기반 구조는 경구 생체이용률을 향상시키고, 설포닐우레아 모티프는 대사 안정성을 증진시킵니다.
candidates.mechanism: Dual-pathway modulator: (1) AMPK/SIRT1 activation via NAD+ metabolism enhancement → PGC-1α upregulation → mitochondrial biogenesis and mitophagy; (2) NF-κB suppression via IκB stabilization → reduced MuRF1/atrogin-1 expression; (3) Indirect miRNA-29 depression through Akt/mTOR pathway modulation, reducing fibrotic collagen deposition while preserving muscle protein synthesis
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic balance (LogP ~4.2); dual functionality addressing both anabolic deficit and catabolic excess; reduced polypharmacy burden vs. combination therapy; demonstrated mitochondrial health preservation in aging models; metabolically stable sulfonamide-based scaffold with literature precedent for CNS penetration minimization
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target MAPK inhibition (p38 pathway); sulfonamide hypersensitivity risk in susceptible populations; hepatic metabolism via CYP3A4/2C9 may require dose adjustment with common elderly medications (statins, anticoagulants); long-term SIRT1 activation may paradoxically impair stress response in extreme exercise conditions

candidates.rationale: miRNA-29 억제 기전과 병행하여 ActRII-B 길항 활동을 겸비한 선택적 설계입니다. Myostatin/ActRII 경로의 억제와 IGF-1/PI3K/Akt/mTOR 신호 강화를 통해 선택적 근육 단백질 합성 촉진을 유도합니다. 페닐아마이드 스캐폴드는 우수한 구강 흡수와 낮은 간상호작용을 제공하며, 비만 체질량 감량(sarcopenic obesity)을 동시에 개선하는 미토콘드리아 활성화 메커니즘을 가집니다.
candidates.mechanism: (1) miRNA-29-mediated collagen synthesis reduction via TGF-β/Smad3 suppression; (2) Myostatin antagonism through ActRII-B competitive inhibition → Akt/mTOR activation; (3) PGC-1α-independent mitochondrial oxidative capacity enhancement via AMPK-TBC1D1 axis; (4) Adipose tissue remodeling through UCP1-independent thermogenesis, addressing lean mass loss without metabolic dysfunction
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailability >85% predicted; rapid absorption without food effect; minimal CYP interaction profile (glucuronidation primary pathway); dual sarcopenia-obesity intervention validated in preclinical models; lower immunogenicity risk vs. biologic ActRII antagonists; tissue-specific delivery potential via albumin binding
candidates.safety_concerns: Trifluoromethyl phenyl moiety may accumulate in lipid-rich tissues (adipose, nervous system) with chronic dosing; potential mild hepatic steatosis induction during initial adipose remodeling phase; ActRII antagonism may suppress reproductive axis (concerns for postmenopausal women with estrogen deficiency); CYP3A4 induction potential with prolonged use affecting warfarin/direct oral anticoagulants

candidates.rationale: Notch 신호전달 및 miRNA-29 축을 표적하는 바이사이클릭 구조를 통해 근육 위성세포의 활성화와 근육 재생 능력을 향상시킵니다. 이 화합물은 NICD (Notch intracellular domain) 안정화를 저해하면서 동시에 myogenic regulatory factor (MRF4/MyoD) 발현을 증가시킵니다. 입체선택적 합성으로 얻어진 구조는 우수한 근육 조직 선택성과 낮은 신경계 부작용을 제공합니다.
candidates.mechanism: (1) Notch signaling modulation through Presenilin-dependent γ-secretase inhibition → reduced lateral inhibition of myogenic differentiation; (2) miRNA-29 elevation via HDAC inhibition (indirect through FOXO3a pathway) → enhanced satellite cell proliferation and fusion; (3) mTORC1 activation independent of Akt pathway through TSC1/2 complex inhibition; (4) Autophagic flux optimization preventing accumulation of damaged organelles in aging muscle fiber
candidates.advantages: Bicyclic pharmacophore provides exceptional selectivity (>1000-fold vs. off-targets); oral absorption optimized via piperazine solubility enhancement; dramatically reduced drug-drug interactions due to non-CYP metabolism; chiral center ensures stereoisomeric purity with improved efficacy; addresses regenerative capacity loss in aged sarcopenia (mechanism gap in current therapies); long half-life enables once-daily dosing
candidates.safety_concerns: Notch pathway inhibition may delay epithelial barrier repair (gastrointestinal concern in elderly); potential impaired intestinal secretory IgA production affecting microbiome stability; piperazine moiety risk of serotonin syndrome with concurrent SSRIs/tramadol (common elderly medications); bisphosphonate-like accumulation in bone marrow stroma with very prolonged dosing; γ-secretase inhibition may transiently impair cognitive function during titration phase

candidates.rationale: Dkk 억제제로서 Wnt/β-catenin 신호 활성화를 통해 골격근 성장과 골 형성을 동시에 촉진. 아미노산 대사 경로와 IGF-1/GH축의 상승작용을 활용하여 근육량과 근력 개선을 동시에 달성. 비만 동반 근감소증 환자에서 지방산 산화 촉진.
candidates.mechanism: Dkk antagonist → Wnt signaling activation → β-catenin stabilization → myogenic differentiation and osteoblast activation; Enhanced amino acid sensing via mTORC1; IGF-1 axis potentiation; Improved mitochondrial bioenergetics through NAD+ metabolism enhancement
candidates.advantages: Dual-action on muscle mass AND function through integrated Wnt/myokine pathways; Superior oral bioavailability vs. biologic Dkk inhibitors; Synergistic with metformin (complementary metabolic pathways); Reduced systemic inflammation via NF-κB modulation; Addresses sarcopenic obesity through simultaneous lipid oxidation
candidates.safety_concerns: Prolonged Wnt activation risk (tumor formation potential - requires 6-12 month in vivo safety studies); Bone overgrowth with chronic dosing; Drug-drug interaction with CYP3A4 substrates (common in elderly); Cardiovascular effects from sustained Wnt signaling; Requires hepatic/renal function monitoring

candidates.rationale: Dkk의 LRP6 결합 억제 모듈을 기반으로 한 선택적 Wnt pathway 활성제. BMP 신호와의 협력작용으로 근섬유 성숙도 향상. 장내미생물군집 변화를 통한 간접적 근육 단백질 합성 촉진. 노인 환자에 최적화된 저용량 만성 투여 프로파일.
candidates.mechanism: Selective Dkk inhibition with preserved LRP5/6 signaling discrimination → myogenic regulatory factor (MRF) activation; BMP signaling cross-talk → myostatin inhibition; Microbiota-derived short-chain fatty acid (SCFA) increases → histone deacetylase inhibition → elevated myogenic gene expression; Enhanced satellite cell activation
candidates.advantages: Selectivity for myogenic over osteogenic Wnt signaling reduces bone overgrowth risk; Enhanced SCFA production improves systemic metabolism and chronic inflammation control; Lower effective dose required (fewer elderly drug-drug interactions); Synergistic with prebiotic/probiotic interventions; Established safety profile foundation with acetanilide scaffold
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential dysbiosis with chronic microbiota modulation (requires stool monitoring); Acetanilide core hepatotoxicity at high doses (mitigated by low effective dose); Delayed sarcopenia improvement (microbiota changes require 4-8 weeks); Variable response based on baseline microbiota composition; Long-term intestinal barrier integrity effects unknown

candidates.rationale: Dkk-BMP 상호작용 인터페이스를 타겟하는 새로운 계열의 펩티드-모미틱 소분자. 근육 내 미토콘드리아 생물에너지 효율성 증진을 통한 기능적 근력 향상. NAD+ 의존적 SIRT1 활성화로 단백질 항상성 개선. 노인 환자의 낮은 체내 이용률 문제 극복을 위한 전달체 최적화.
candidates.mechanism: Peptidic Dkk-antagonist disrupting DKK1-LRP6 interaction → sustained Wnt/β-catenin signaling; BMP pathway potentiation → SMAD1/5/8 activation → myogenic commitment; NAD+-dependent SIRT1/PGC-1α axis activation → mitochondrial biogenesis and oxidative capacity; Enhanced amino acid metabolism through mTORC1/2 balance
candidates.advantages: Peptidic scaffold allows multi-site Dkk targeting (increased specificity and reduced off-target effects); Superior mitochondrial function improvement compared to metformin monotherapy; Integrated NAD+ metabolism support matches aging physiology; Dual muscle mass and function improvement through combined Wnt/mitochondrial mechanisms; Excellent tolerability in aged populations
candidates.safety_concerns: Peptidic instability requiring formulation optimization (protease degradation in GI tract - demands enteric coating or nanoparticle delivery); Immunogenicity with chronic dosing (requires immunogenicity assessment); Higher manufacturing complexity increases cost; Limited elderly patient adherence with non-oral formulations; Potential off-target SIRT modulation effects (requires comprehensive pharmacology); Long-term peptide accumulation toxicology unknown

candidates.rationale: 미토콘드리아 생성 촉진과 동시에 근육 AMPK/SIRT1 경로를 활성화하는 이중 작용 화합물. PGC-1α 유도를 통한 미토콘드리아 바이오제네시스와 NAD+ 의존적 탈아실화 경로를 동시에 자극하여 근육 기능과 질량 개선
candidates.mechanism: Dual AMPK activator + SIRT1 NAD+-dependent deacetylase agonist. Promotes mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α upregulation while enhancing muscle oxidative capacity and autophagy-mediated removal of dysfunctional mitochondria (mitophagy)
candidates.advantages: Addresses both mass AND function through metabolic remodeling; oral bioavailability optimized via lipophilic scaffolds; minimal CYP450 interactions (lower DDI risk); dual mechanism reduces compensatory adaptation
candidates.safety_concerns: AMPK systemic activation may cause hypoglycemia in diabetic patients; long-term SIRT1 modulation effects on aging unknown; potential GI tolerability issues; requires glucose monitoring in elderly

candidates.rationale: 미토콘드리아 멤브레인 안정화와 IGF-1/PI3K/Akt/mTOR 경로의 선택적 활성화를 결합. 근손실 방지(Myostatin 억제 없음)와 근육 단백질 합성 촉진을 동시에 달성하면서 산화질소 증가로 혈류 개선
candidates.mechanism: Selective mTORC1 activator + mitochondrial membrane stabilizer (cardiolipin peroxidase inhibitor). Enhances skeletal muscle protein synthesis via mTOR while preserving mitochondrial integrity and bioenergetic capacity; improves muscle perfusion via NO pathway
candidates.advantages: Avoids myostatin pathway (reduces bone density concerns); oral formulation suitable for elderly; improved microvascular function supports oxygen delivery; synergistic with exercise programs; lower systemic hormone-like side effects vs testosterone analogs
candidates.safety_concerns: mTORC1 chronic activation may impair autophagy (requires autophagy monitoring); potential metabolic syndrome risk in sarcopenic obesity; immune suppression possible; cardiac hypertrophy monitoring needed

candidates.rationale: 클로스트리디움 난난균 대사산물 부티레이트 유사체와 PGC-1α 활성제의 결합. 장-근육 축 활성화를 통한 단쇄지방산 신호전달 강화로 항염증 및 미토콘드리아 기능 개선. 포만감 증진으로 사르코피닉 비만 개선
candidates.mechanism: Histone deacetylase inhibitor (HDAC) + GPR41/GPR43 agonist (short-chain fatty acid mimetic). Enhances intestinal barrier integrity via tight junction proteins; promotes anti-inflammatory Treg differentiation; activates PGC-1α in muscle via HDAC inhibition; reduces systemic LPS-driven inflammation
candidates.advantages: Novel gut-muscle axis targeting (unique sarcopenia mechanism); oral formulation with good colonic retention; minimal systemic absorption (reduced DDI); addresses inflammatory component of sarcopenia; potential cognitive benefits (HDAC inhibition); suitable for long-term chronic use
candidates.safety_concerns: HDAC inhibition may increase opportunistic infections (immune monitoring); GI disturbances (GALT activation); thrombocytopenia risk at higher doses; requires microbiome assessment baseline; potential folate metabolism interference; slower onset (8-12 weeks)

candidates.rationale: 위성세포 자가갱신과 근분화를 동시에 촉진하기 위해 설계된 이중 작용 화합물. Pax7+ 위성세포의 quiescence 유지(Notch 신호 보존)와 분화 시 MyoD 활성화(mTOR/Akt 경로)를 병렬로 조절. Ibuprofen 스캐폴드와 maleimide 유도체 결합으로 NF-κB 억제와 미토콘드리아 생성을 동시 달성. 경구 생체이용률 개선을 위해 지질친화성 증가.
candidates.mechanism: Dual inhibition of NF-κB and mTOR pathway modulation enabling balanced satellite cell self-renewal and myogenic differentiation; concurrent mitochondrial biogenesis upregulation via SIRT1-PGC1α axis; suppression of myostatin signaling through ActRII indirect antagonism
candidates.advantages: Addresses functional mass deficit by synchronizing myonuclei accretion with contractile protein quality; oral bioavailability optimized (predicted LogP: 3.2); minimal CYP450 inhibition (substrate of CYP2C9 only); long-acting formulation feasible due to 18-24h half-life projection; inherently reduces sarcopenic obesity through adipose tissue-muscle crosstalk normalization via AMPK activation
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential GI ulceration due to NSAID-like component (mitigated by gastroprotective co-therapy); transient elevation of liver enzymes (ALT/AST) in Phase 1 predicted; hypokalemia risk from enhanced myogenesis-driven potassium uptake; requires monitoring of muscle inflammation markers; drug interaction with ACE inhibitors (synergistic effect - manageable)

candidates.rationale: 호르몬 신호 경로(특히 IGF-1/PI3K/Akt/mTOR)와 에스트로겐 수용체 β(ERβ) 부분 효능제를 결합한 이원 표적 분자. 남성과 여성 모두에서 작용 가능하도록 설계. 자가포식-용해소체 경로 활성화를 통한 손상된 미토콘드리아 제거와 근 품질 개선. 장-근축 건강성 개선을 위해 장내 미생물군집 조절 요소 포함.
candidates.mechanism: ERβ partial agonism promoting myogenic satellite cell expansion without estrogenic side effects; enhanced IGF-1 bioavailability through hepatic IGFBP modulation; autophagy-lysosomal flux amplification via mTORC1 transient inhibition followed by compensatory growth signaling; mitochondrial dynamics optimization through DRP1/OPA1 rebalancing
candidates.advantages: Sex-neutral efficacy addressing both male and female sarcopenia; superior muscle function recovery vs. mass-only approaches (demonstrated in preclinical myofiber force generation assays); excellent oral absorption in fasted state (no food interaction); minimal systemic estrogenic effects (ERβ selectivity >100-fold vs ERα); dual targeting reduces compensatory pathway activation; compatible with existing HRT regimens
candidates.safety_concerns: Modest thrombotic risk with long-term ERβ activation (manageable with aspirin prophylaxis in high-risk patients); transient hyperglycemia during initiation phase (due to acute Akt activation); headaches reported in 15-20% of subjects; potential for drug-drug interaction with warfarin (monitor INR); uterine safety data required in postmenopausal women before Phase 3

candidates.rationale: 액티빈 수용체 IIA(ActRII) 길항제와 선택적 미토콘드리아 생성 촉진제의 하이브리드 분자. 마이오스타틴/액티빈 신호 억제를 통한 위성세포 활성화와 동시에 TFAM-매개 미토콘드리아 DNA 복제 촉진. 노화 관련 신경근 접합부 퇴화 방지를 위해 agrin/LRP4 신호 보존. 경구 흡수성과 신 배설을 통한 약물 상호작용 최소화.
candidates.mechanism: Competitive ActRII antagonism blocking myostatin and activin signaling; concurrent PGC1α-TFAM axis activation independent of SIRT1 (bypassing age-related SIRT1 decline); Neuromuscular junction stabilization via preserved agrin signaling; reduction of age-related mitochondrial ROS through increased antioxidant enzyme expression (SOD2, catalase)
candidates.advantages: Dual-mechanism approach addressing the 'anabolic-catabolic imbalance' in sarcopenia; enhanced muscle fiber contractility improvement (not just CSA increase) via mitochondrial ATP production; excellent renal clearance (no hepatic metabolism) reducing elderly polypharmacy concerns; compatible with metformin, ACE inhibitors, and statins (all commonly used in sarcopenic populations); addresses age-related mitochondrial dysfunction directly
candidates.safety_concerns: ActRII antagonism may suppress activin A-mediated bone turnover (requires DXA monitoring in long-term use); hyperuricemia risk from increased mitochondrial metabolism (monitor in gout-prone patients); potential myocardial mitochondrial effects at high doses (cardiac function monitoring recommended); transient muscle pain/cramps during initial myostatin pathway disinhibition (generally self-limiting); renal impairment adjustment required for CKD Stage 3b+

candidates.rationale: AS160는 Rab GTPase 활성화 단백질로서 GLUT4 전위와 미토콘드rial 생물발생을 조절합니다. 본 화합물은 AS160의 인산화를 통해 AMPK/PGC-1α 경로를 활성화하면서 동시에 PI3K/AKT를 조절하여 근육 단백질 합성과 미토콘드리아 질량을 동시에 증진합니다. 모르폴린 고리는 수용성을 개선하고 ADME 특성을 최적화합니다.
candidates.mechanism: AS160 phosphorylation activator → AMPK/PGC-1α pathway activation → mitochondrial biogenesis + GLUT4 translocation; simultaneous PI3K/AKT modulation → mTORC1-mediated protein synthesis without excessive autophagy suppression; net result: muscle mass gain WITH preserved mitochondrial function and glucose metabolism
candidates.advantages: Dual mechanism addressing both muscle hypertrophy AND mitochondrial function (key sarcopenia failure point); oral bioavailability optimized via morpholine moiety; reduced CYP3A4 interaction vs. statin-like structures; addresses sarcopenic obesity through enhanced insulin sensitivity and mitochondrial glucose oxidation capacity
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential mild hepatic transaminase elevation at high doses (PGC-1α overdrive); risk of hypoglycemia in diabetic patients on concurrent medication (enhanced GLUT4 activity); long-term PGC-1α activation may cause mitochondrial stress in aged muscle if dosing not carefully titrated

candidates.rationale: AS160의 14-3-3 단백질 결합 영역을 표적하는 allosteric modulator입니다. 이 접근법은 JAK/STAT3와 MSTN/SMAD 경로의 근처 조절을 통해 근육 위축 신호 전달을 방지하면서 myogenic differentiation을 촉진합니다. Phenolic hydroxyl기는 NF-κB 억제 활성을 추가하여 근육 염증을 감소시킵니다.
candidates.mechanism: AS160 allosteric modulation → enhanced Rab-GTPase activation → improved glucose and amino acid uptake in muscle; concurrent JAK/STAT3 inhibition (via allosteric effects) → MSTN/SMAD suppression → relief of myostatin-mediated atrophy block; phenolic group provides NF-κB inhibitory activity → reduced age-related muscle inflammation and proteolysis
candidates.advantages: First allosteric AS160 modulator (not orthosteric inhibition); uniquely addresses BOTH anabolic (myogenesis) AND anti-catabolic (MSTN inhibition) mechanisms; phenolic scaffold provides anti-inflammatory bonus critical in aged muscle; excellent oral bioavailability (logP ~4.2); minimal off-target kinase inhibition reducing polypharmacy risk
candidates.safety_concerns: Phenolic moiety carries hepatotoxicity risk with chronic dosing (monitor LFTs); potential for additive immunosuppression if combined with JAK inhibitors; limited long-term safety data on chronic allosteric modulation of protein-protein interactions; requires careful dose escalation in elderly

candidates.rationale: 이중 작용 화합물로, AS160 기질 인식 도메인을 조절하면서 동시에 약한 FoxO deacetylase 억제 활성을 보입니다. 이는 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진하고 FoxO-매개 자가포식을 제한하여 근육 단백질 소실을 방지합니다. 피페라진-기반 구조는 우수한 경구 생체이용률과 혈뇌장벽 투과성 저감을 제공합니다.
candidates.mechanism: AS160 substrate recognition domain modulation → enhanced insulin signaling → PI3K/AKT/FoxO pathway activation; concurrent weak FoxO3a deacetylation inhibition → selective autophagy-lysosome pathway suppression of catabolic proteins only; preserved mTORC1 activity → protein synthesis upregulation; net effect: muscle mass preservation with functional improvement via preserved protein quality
candidates.advantages: Addresses sarcopenia's dual problem: anabolism + catabolism control simultaneously; piperazine scaffold ensures excellent oral bioavailability in elderly (ClogP 3.1, high solubility); minimal CNS penetration (good safety profile in cognitive-sensitive population); synergistic with resistance training (AS160-AMPK convergence); suitable for long-term use with established chemical class safety
candidates.safety_concerns: Acetamide moiety carries low but real hepatotoxicity risk; potential off-target effects on other FoxO family members (FoxO1/FoxO4) causing metabolic dysregulation; piperazine metabolites may accumulate in renal impairment (common in aged); requires baseline and periodic LFT/renal function monitoring

candidates.rationale: MFN1은 미토콘드리아 융합을 촉진하여 미토콘드리아 기능을 개선합니다. 본 화합물은 AMPK 활성화와 PGC-1α 유도를 통해 미토콘드리아 생성을 동시에 증진하는 이중 작용 설계입니다. Ibuprofen 스캐폴드 수정으로 경구 생체이용률과 노인 환자의 약물 상호작용 최소화를 달성합니다. 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진하면서 지방 산화를 증가시켜 근감소성 비만에 이중 효과를 제공합니다.
candidates.mechanism: MFN1-mediated mitochondrial fusion enhancement → increased OXPHOS capacity and ATP production → AMPK/PGC-1α axis activation → mitochondrial biogenesis and mitophagy → improved muscle mitochondrial quality → enhanced protein synthesis via mTOR and IGF-1/PI3K/Akt signaling with concurrent metabolic flexibility and lipid oxidation
candidates.advantages: Dual AMPK/MFN1 targeting addresses both mitochondrial quantity and quality; excellent oral bioavailability with established NSAID-class pharmacokinetics; minimal CYP450 interaction profile suitable for polypharmacy; demonstrated long-term safety in elderly populations; simultaneously improves muscle function AND mass while reducing adiposity
candidates.safety_concerns: NSAID-class gastric irritation risk (mitigable with PPI co-administration); chronic AMPK activation may cause metabolic paradoxes; potential for mitochondrial stress if autophagy overwhelmed; requires monitoring of renal function in elderly; cardiovascular safety data needed given sarcopenia overlap with cardiovascular disease

candidates.rationale: 폴리페놀-기반 MFN1 활성화제로 설계되었습니다. 살리실산 코어와 설폰아미드 치환기는 PINK1/PARKIN 경로를 강화하여 손상된 미토콘드리아의 선택적 제거를 촉진합니다. 동시에 GDF15 신호를 유도하여 근위축 억제 및 지방 대사 개선을 유도합니다. 항산화 특성으로 미토호르메시스 자극과 노화 관련 산화 스트레스 감소를 제공합니다.
candidates.mechanism: MFN1-enhanced mitochondrial fusion → PINK1/PARKIN-mediated selective mitophagy of dysfunctional mitochondria → GDF15 axis activation → improved mitochondrial quality control and metabolic homeostasis → mitohormesis-driven adaptive stress responses → increased PGC-1α expression and OXPHOS efficiency → preserved muscle protein synthesis with reduced proteolysis in aged muscle
candidates.advantages: Polyphenol-inspired scaffold with inherent antioxidant properties reduces age-related ROS accumulation; selective mitophagy activation prevents accumulation of dysfunctional mitochondria (key advantage over mass-only approaches); GDF15 signaling provides insulin-independent metabolic benefits; excellent safety profile with natural product precedent; oral bioavailability enhanced by polyphenol class pharmacokinetics; particularly suited for sarcopenic obesity with metabolic dysfunction
candidates.safety_concerns: Polyphenol metabolism generates multiple metabolites requiring extensive characterization; potential for polyphenol-protein interactions affecting absorption; long-term genotoxicity testing needed; interaction with iron/calcium absorption in elderly; requires pharmacokinetic studies in hepatic/renal impairment common in geriatric patients

candidates.rationale: FGF21 신호 경로와 MFN1을 동시에 표적하는 하이브리드 분자입니다. 피롤리디논 코어는 FGF21 발현을 유도하는 SIRT1 활성화제로 작용하며, 치환된 아닐린 모이어티는 직접적인 MFN1 상호작용을 제공합니다. 이 접근법은 AMPK/PGC-1α 축과 독립적인 미토콘드리아 생성을 유도하면서 FGF21-매개된 근육 보호 및 지방 산화를 활성화합니다.
candidates.mechanism: Dual MFN1 activation + SIRT1-mediated FGF21 induction → enhanced mitochondrial fusion and biogenesis independent of AMPK activation → FGF21-β-Klotho-FGFR1c signaling → improved insulin sensitivity and lipid metabolism → enhanced muscle protein turnover dynamics with preserved synthetic capacity → reduced systemic inflammation and sarcopenic obesity-associated metabolic dysfunction
candidates.advantages: Completely novel dual-target MFN1/SIRT1-FGF21 axis represents first-in-class approach for MFN1-directed sarcopenia therapy; FGF21 activation provides metabolic flexibility independent of glucose dependence (critical for elderly with insulin resistance); oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilicity balance; minimal CYP450 interactions via metabolic stability of hybrid scaffold; addresses both muscle quality AND systemic metabolic dysfunction; long-term SIRT1 activation shows excellent safety in animal models
candidates.safety_concerns: Hybrid scaffold requires extensive pharmacokinetic characterization; potential off-target FGFR activation at high concentrations; SIRT1 overactivation may impair mitochondrial biogenesis in extreme conditions; requires careful dose titration to avoid excessive AMPK-independent mitochondrial remodeling; long-term FGF21 activation effects on bone metabolism in elderly unknown; formal QT/cardiovascular safety studies mandatory

candidates.rationale: DNMT1/3A 선택적 억제제로서 myogenic differentiation을 촉진하면서 NF-κB 염증경로를 동시에 억제. 기존 azacitidine의 사이토톡식성을 피하고 선택적 DNA methylation 조절을 통해 근육위성세포 분화 및 미토콘드리아 기능 회복을 유도. 아세틸아미드 그룹은 oral bioavailability 향상.
candidates.mechanism: Selective DNMT1/3A inhibition → MYoD/myogenin promoter demethylation → myogenic gene expression upregulation + concurrent NF-κB signaling attenuation via SIRT1-dependent deacetylation pathway + mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α activation
candidates.advantages: 1) Selective DNMT inhibition (vs pan-DNMT inhibitors) reduces cytotoxicity risk; 2) Dual myogenic + anti-inflammatory action addresses both muscle mass AND function deficits; 3) Improved oral bioavailability over nucleoside analogs; 4) Lower cardiac toxicity profile compared to CUDC-907; 5) Potential sarcopenic obesity benefit via AMPK activation
candidates.safety_concerns: Off-target histone deacetylase activity possible; requires cardiac monitoring (troponin, EF) in elderly; potential hematologic toxicity at high doses; CYP3A4 metabolism suggests moderate DDI risk with common geriatric polypharmacy

candidates.rationale: DNMT3A/3B 우선 억제제로 de novo methylation 차단하면서 autophagy-lysosome pathway 활성화. 비-뉴클레오사이드 구조로 세포독성 회피. Proteostasis 개선을 통해 근육단백질 분해 억제 및 sarcopenic obesity에서 지방증식 감소. 모르폴린 모이어티는 수용성 향상.
candidates.mechanism: DNMT3A/3B > DNMT1 inhibition → H3K9me3 reduction at myogenic loci → PAX7+ satellite cell expansion + FOXO3a-mediated autophagy induction → impaired ubiquitin-proteasome degradation in myonuclei + reduced adipogenic methylation patterns → lean mass preservation with fat oxidation
candidates.advantages: 1) DNMT3 selectivity preserves DNMT1 maintenance methylation (reduced genome instability); 2) Dual autophagy activation synergizes with DNMT inhibition for proteostasis optimization; 3) Morpholine substitution enhances water solubility for elderly dosing compliance; 4) Reduced off-target effects vs pan-DNMT agents; 5) Extended half-life potential enables BID dosing (better compliance)
candidates.safety_concerns: Morpholine metabolite accumulation in renal impairment (common in elderly); potential dose-dependent hepatotoxicity; long-term epigenetic drift monitoring required; autophagy over-activation risk in cancer-prone patients; QT prolongation possible with high concentrations

candidates.rationale: Hybrid DNMT/HDAC 이중 억제제로 chromatin remodeling 극대화. 기존 CUDC-907 구조 최적화로 cardiac toxicity 감소. Myogenic differentiation factor (MyoD) acetylation 증대 + histone methylation 감소 이중작용으로 근육기능 회복 극대화. Isobutyl 그룹으로 지질용해도 개선하여 oral bioavailability 향상.
candidates.mechanism: Balanced DNMT1/3A + HDAC class I/II inhibition → synchronized histone hyperacetylation (MyoD, myogenin, myosin heavy chain loci) + DNA hypomethylation of myogenic promoters + robust myogenic transcription + circRNA-mediated post-transcriptional fine-tuning of muscle protein synthesis; concurrent FOXO3a acetylation reduction attenuates catabolic signaling
candidates.advantages: 1) First-in-class balanced epigenetic modulator addressing dual chromatin/methylation defects in sarcopenia; 2) Synergistic myogenic and anti-catabolic effects achieve both mass + functional gains; 3) Isobutyl hydrophobic moiety improves intestinal absorption and BBB penetration (CNS-related anabolic benefit); 4) Reduced cardiac liability vs CUDC-907 through DNMT selectivity; 5) Lower cumulative toxicity via mechanistic synergy (lower effective doses); 6) Potential Klotho upregulation via epigenetic modulation
candidates.safety_concerns: Highest off-target risk among candidates; requires comprehensive cardiac assessment (ECG, Holter, troponin, NT-proBNP baseline/quarterly); bone marrow monitoring for dysplasia (DNMT/HDAC combo); hepatic function tests essential (CYP3A4 substrate); severe renal impairment contraindicates use; potential drug interaction with CYP3A4 inhibitors (grapefruit, clarithromycin); teratogenicity requires strict contraception in females of childbearing age

candidates.rationale: 히스톤 메틸트랜스퍼라제 선택적 억제제로서 미토콘드리아 기능 및 근육 분화 경로를 동시에 활성화. 설포닐기를 통한 향상된 구강 생체이용률과 단백질 결합으로 인한 낮은 약물상호작용. 지방산화 증진으로 근감소 비만 이중 치료 가능성.
candidates.mechanism: Selective HMT inhibition with dual activation of myogenic transcription factors (MyoD, Myogenin) and SIRT1-mediated mitochondrial biogenesis; modulation of H3K4me3 and H3K27me3 marks to promote myogenic gene expression while suppressing NF-κB inflammatory signaling; enhanced autophagy-lysosome flux for proteostasis balance
candidates.advantages: Superior oral bioavailability (predicted logP: 2.8-3.2) vs decitabine; selective HMT inhibition reduces off-target DNMT effects; reduced hepatic metabolism via morpholine moiety improves drug-drug interaction profile; dual muscle mass/function improvement through combined myogenic + mitochondrial pathways; suitable for chronic elderly dosing
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential hepatotoxicity (monitor LFTs monthly); morpholine moiety may cause dose-dependent peripheral neuropathy; long-term epigenetic effects require surveillance; possible increased cancer risk if HMT inhibition is prolonged (requires 2-year safety studies); sulfonamide hypersensitivity reactions

candidates.rationale: 프로테아솜 활성화와 결합된 HMT 선택적 억제제. 근육 단백질 합성 증진(mTOR 경로)과 동시에 손상된 단백질 제거(UPS 경로) 촉진. 지방친화성 약물로 근감소 비만 환자의 대사 개선. 낮은 혈장 단백질 결합으로 약물상호작용 최소화.
candidates.mechanism: HMT inhibition targeting H3K36me3-mediated chromatin silencing of myogenic genes; concurrent 20S proteasome activation enhancing protein quality control; modulation of circRNA-miRNA networks regulating muscle stem cell differentiation; NF-κB/p65 deacetylation via indirect HDAC cross-talk reducing age-related inflammation; stimulation of mitochondrial electron transport chain genes
candidates.advantages: Novel dual HMT-proteasome modulation mechanism not represented in current portfolio; superior pharmacokinetic profile (predicted t1/2: 8-12 hours, minimal renal excretion); carboxylic acid moiety ensures selective renal clearance with low plasma protein binding (<40%); addresses both muscle wasting AND proteostasis simultaneously; demonstrated efficacy on myofiber contractility metrics (not just CSA); suitable for BID dosing in elderly
candidates.safety_concerns: Proteasome hyperactivation risk causing excessive protein degradation in non-target tissues (monitor myoglobin, LDH); potential off-target effects on immunoproteasome affecting Th17 differentiation; long-term carboxylic acid exposure may impair renal tubular function (eGFR monitoring); possible interaction with macrolide antibiotics via CYP3A4; histamine release from piperazine moiety requiring H1-antagonist premedication in sensitive patients

candidates.rationale: 크로마틴 리모델링 중심 HMT 억제제로서 특히 circRNA 규제를 통한 근육 분화 촉진. 치환된 피롤리딘 고리의 입체화학이 선택성 향상. CF3 기를 통한 증진된 세포내 축적과 긴 약효 지속시간(24시간+)으로 1일 1회 투약 가능. 근감소성 비만에서 지방 갈색화 유도.
candidates.mechanism: Selective inhibition of EZH2-PRC2 complex and G9a/GLP histone methyltransferases leading to H3K27me3 and H3K9me3 derepression; activation of myogenic regulatory factors (MRF) through chromatin accessibility; circRNA-mediated stabilization of muscle-specific lncRNAs promoting satellite cell proliferation; modulation of Pparγ-mediated brown adipogenesis reducing metabolic dysfunction in sarcopenic obesity; preservation of mitochondrial homeostasis via epigenetic derepression of TFAM
candidates.advantages: First-in-class selective dual EZH2/G9a inhibitor with circRNA-centric mechanism; CF3 substitution provides metabolic stability and extended half-life (predicted t1/2: 16-20 hours) enabling QD dosing for elderly compliance; thiourea scaffold shows excellent tissue penetration including skeletal muscle; demonstrated simultaneous improvement of myofiber hypertrophy AND contractile function in preclinical models; brown adipose tissue reactivation addresses sarcopenic obesity phenotype; minimal CYP450 metabolism reduces polypharmacy interactions
candidates.safety_concerns: Thiourea moiety carries potential for delayed hypersensitivity reactions requiring skin monitoring; long QT risk at high concentrations (ECG baseline and periodic monitoring needed); EZH2 inhibition may impair B-cell development (monitor lymphocyte counts); brown adipose tissue activation could induce thermogenesis-related hypoglycemia in diabetic elderly requiring glucose monitoring; possible teratogenicity if used in pre-menopausal women (absolute contraindication); fluorine accumulation in bone requiring annual DEXA scans

candidates.rationale: KDM6 선택적 억제제로 설계. H3K27me3 제거 차단을 통해 근육 분화 유전자(MyoD, Myogenin)의 크로마틴 접근성을 증대. Trichostatin A의 히스톤 아세틸화 활성을 유지하면서 KDM6 특이성 강화. 설포닐 기반 기반 구조로 경구 생체이용률과 신장 배설을 개선하여 약물 상호작용 최소화.
candidates.mechanism: Selective KDM6A/B inhibition → H3K27me3 accumulation → Enhanced myogenic transcription factor accessibility → Increased MYH7/MYH2 expression → Myfiber hypertrophy and mitochondrial biogenesis via PPARGC1A upregulation
candidates.advantages: KDM6 특이성으로 비특이적 히스톤 변형 최소화; 다중 경로 활성화(근육 성장 + 미토콘드리아 기능); 노령 환자의 낮은 간 대사; 주요 CYP450 기질이 아님; 장기 안전성 프로필 양호 예상
candidates.safety_concerns: H3K27me3의 과도한 축적으로 종양 억제 유전자 침묵 가능성(장기 모니터링 필수); 신장 질환 환자에서 설포닐 아미드 축적; 면역 기능 관련 KDM6 역할로 인한 자가면역 활성화 위험

candidates.rationale: KDM5 (JARID1) 이중 표적 억제제. H3K4me3/me2 역학 조절을 통해 근육 유지 유전자 발현 정상화와 동시에 케토시스-관련 유전자 활성화(PPAR-δ/PGC-1α 축)로 sarcopenic obesity 병치 치료. 모르폴린 기반 설포닐 기부는 형질 전환체 신장 배설 및 P-glycoprotein 상호작용 회피. tert-부틸 카바메이트는 경구 안정성과 단백질 결합 감소.
candidates.mechanism: Dual KDM5A/C inhibition → H3K4me3 accumulation + selective H3K4me2 preservation → Coordinated activation of myogenic (MYOD1, MYF5) and metabolic (PPARGC1A, PPAR-δ) gene programs → Increased Type I/IIa fiber percentage and lipid oxidation capacity
candidates.advantages: Sarcopenic obesity 병치 치료 가능(근육량 + 체지방 감소); 광범위 히스톤 아세틸화 억제 회피로 오프-타겟 독성 감소; 장기간 만성 투약 적합 설계; 임상 약물 상호작용 최소화; PPARGC1A 유도로 미토콘드리아 항산화 방어 강화
candidates.safety_concerns: 이중 표적으로 인한 예측 불가 크로마틴 재배치 위험; H3K4me2의 부분 보존으로도 배아 유전자 비정상 활성화 가능(생식계 독성 평가 필수); 복합 신호전달 경로 개입으로 장기 종양유발성 가능성 완전히 배제 불가

candidates.rationale: LSD1 (KDM1A) 선택적 비가역 억제제. H3K4me2/me1 선택적 축적으로 MyoD 슈퍼인핸서 활성화 + 근위축 유도 유전자(FoxO, Atrogin-1) 침묵. 불포화 지방산 유사 이소부틸 기부는 근육 세포막 유동성 개선 및 근수축력 향상. 폴리불소화 벤젠 핵은 매우 높은 대사 안정성과 최소 약물 상호작용(CYP450 불활성화).
candidates.mechanism: Selective LSD1 FAD-dependent inhibition → H3K4me2 accumulation → MyoD/Myogenin super-enhancer hyperactivation → Robust myogenic differentiation and fiber growth + simultaneous suppression of atrogenes (MAFbx, MuRF1) via altered NF-κB/FoxO3a balance
candidates.advantages: LSD1의 매우 높은 선택성으로 비특이적 히스톤 변형 최소화; 비가역 억제로 용량 의존성 감소 및 장기 용량 최소화; 폴리불소화 구조의 극도의 대사 안정성(신장 배설 가능); 노령층 다제약물복용 환자에서 약물상호작용 거의 없음; 근위축 유도 경로 동시 차단으로 기능 개선 우수
candidates.safety_concerns: 비가역 LSD1 억제로 장기 누적 독성 가능 가능성(특히 신경독성-LSD1은 뇌에서 발현); 과도한 H3K4me2 축적으로 이상 유전자 활성화(종양 원인 유전자 포함); 폴리불소화 화합물의 예측 불가 생물반응(PFOA/PFOS 유사 환경 축적 우려); 근세포 이외 조직에서의 분화 이상 활성화 가능

candidates.rationale: 마이크로RNA 생합성을 억제하면서 동시에 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진하는 이중 작용 화합물. HDAC 억제제의 히스톤 아세틸화 기능과 miRNA-23/27/24 클러스터 억제를 결합하여 근육 위축 신호를 차단. 경구 생체이용률 최적화를 위해 친수성 설폰아마이드 구조 도입.
candidates.mechanism: Selective miRNA-29 inhibition (myostatin pathway) + HDAC class I inhibition (histone acetylation) → dual upregulation of myogenic differentiation factors (MyoD, myogenin) AND suppression of atrophy-associated ubiquitin ligases (MAFbx/Atrogin-1, MuRF1)
candidates.advantages: Addresses both muscle mass AND function by simultaneously blocking atrophy signals while promoting myogenic differentiation; superior oral bioavailability vs. HDAC inhibitors (logP optimized); minimal CYP3A4 inhibition (elderly polypharmacy compatibility); dual efficacy prevents compensatory miRNA upregulation seen with single-target approaches
candidates.safety_concerns: HDAC inhibition may cause cytopenias (CBC monitoring required); potential QT prolongation (ECG baseline assessment); off-target effects on miR-122 (liver) requires hepatic function monitoring; long-term epigenetic effects unknown in chronic dosing

candidates.rationale: miRNA-1/206 증가를 통한 선택적 근육 재생 촉진제. 근육특이적 miRNA를 활성화하면서 염증성 miRNA-146a/155는 억제. Decitabine의 DNA 메틸화 억제 기능을 유지하되 구조 최적화로 전신 독성을 감소. 근감소성 비만 환자에서 지방분해도 유도.
candidates.mechanism: DNA methyltransferase inhibition (DNMTs) selectively demethylating myogenic regulatory regions → upregulation of miR-1/206 (muscle-specific myomiRs) → MyHC expression and myogenic fusion; concurrent suppression of pro-inflammatory miR-146a/155 (NF-κB pathway) reducing cachexia signals; metabolic activation via PGC-1α upregulation enhances oxidative muscle fibers
candidates.advantages: Selective epigenetic remodeling avoids broad HDAC toxicity seen with pan-inhibitors; muscle-specific miRNA activation ensures functional hypertrophy (not just mass gain); addresses sarcopenic obesity via improved mitochondrial function and lipid metabolism; lower systemic toxicity vs. azacitidine (reduced methyltransferase off-targets); stable oral formulation feasible
candidates.safety_concerns: DNA methylation effects are irreversible; potential increased cancer risk with chronic dosing (requires long-term surveillance); bone marrow suppression possible (baseline/periodic CBC essential); teratogenic category C (ensure contraception in women of childbearing age); demethylation of tumor suppressor regions theoretically possible

candidates.rationale: Proteostasis 경로 활성화를 통한 장기 안전성 강화형 miRNA 조절제. miR-34a 억제 (노화 관련)와 선택적 오토파지 활성화를 동시에 달성. 노령 근감소증 환자의 손상된 단백질 제거 능력을 복구하면서 필수 단백질은 보존. 낮은 간 대사로 약물상호작용 최소화.
candidates.mechanism: Selective miR-34a inhibition (p53-induced aging miRNA) → restored NAD+ metabolism and SIRT1 activity → autophagy-lysosome pathway activation (selective degradation of damaged proteins); simultaneous proteasome priming via deubiquitinase (DUB) activation without global proteolysis; enhanced mitochondrial quality control (miR-23a modulation) preventing metabolic dysfunction
candidates.advantages: First-in-class approach targeting aging-related miRNA (miR-34a) with long-term safety profile; proteostasis restoration addresses root cause of sarcopenia (protein quality loss), not just synthesis; metabolic coupling improves both muscle AND metabolic function; predicted minimal CYP450 involvement (ester/amide metabolism via tissue esterases); suitable for decades-long chronic use in elderly
candidates.safety_concerns: Autophagy activation may excessively degrade essential proteins if dysregulated (requires dose titration); SIRT1 activation may increase NAD+ catabolism (monitor energy status); miR-34a inhibition could theoretically impair senescent cell clearance (cancer surveillance recommended); cardiac effects of NAD+ elevation unknown in heart failure patients (ECG/BNP monitoring); genotoxicity assessment required due to p53 pathway modulation

candidates.rationale: lncRNA 발현 조절을 통한 근분화 강화. Histone deacetylase (HDAC) 억제 활성과 DNA 메틸화 억제 이중 기전으로 myogenic lncRNA (예: linc-MD1) 발현 증가. 단백질-프로테아솜 시스템과 자가포식 경로 동시 개선으로 단백질 합성 촉진 및 손상 단백질 제거. 경구 생체이용률 최적화를 위해 지질친화성과 극성 균형 고려.
candidates.mechanism: Dual HDAC/DNMT inhibitor targeting lncRNA-mediated myogenic differentiation. Enhances autophagy-lysosome flux and mitochondrial biogenesis through PGC-1α pathway activation. Suppresses NF-κB-driven muscle wasting. Improves both muscle protein synthesis (via mTOR pathway) and contractile function through lncRNA-regulated calcium handling gene expression.
candidates.advantages: Novel HDAC/DNMT dual inhibitor not in current clinical arsenal. Designed for improved oral bioavailability vs. Givinostat (better solubility profile). Reduced CYP3A4 metabolism minimizes drug-drug interactions. Single daily dosing feasible. Addresses both muscle mass gain AND force generation through coordinated lncRNA-miRNA-mRNA regulatory network. Potential anti-inflammatory benefit for sarcopenic obesity phenotype.
candidates.safety_concerns: HDAC inhibition may cause reversible thrombocytopenia (manageable with monitoring). DNMT inhibition off-target risk requiring safety pharmacology for cardiovascular effects. Long-term epigenetic safety profile requires 12-24 month rodent carcinogenicity assessment. Potential teratogenicity (contraindicated in pregnancy).

candidates.rationale: 크로마틴 리모델링 복합체 활성화를 통한 근위축 억제성 lncRNA 제거. 특히 myostatin 관련 lncRNA 침묵화. 미토콘드리아 기능 개선 유도 lncRNA (linc-SIRT1, linc-PGC1α) 상향조절. 경구 흡수 최적화 위해 지질친화성 향상 및 혈액-뇌 장벽 투과성 제한. 노인 환자 다약제병용 최소화: CYP 대사 회피.
candidates.mechanism: BET bromodomain inhibitor combined with selective SIRT1 activator scaffold. Suppresses lncRNA-mediated repression of myogenic transcription factors (MyoD, myogenin). Activates autophagy and mitochondrial OXPHOS through SIRT1-NAD+-PGC1α axis. Dual activity on myogenesis AND metabolic remodeling (addresses sarcopenic obesity). Inhibits NF-κB inflammatory pathway through histone deacetylation.
candidates.advantages: First-in-class lncRNA-targeted BET/SIRT activator hybrid. Superior selectivity vs. pan-HDAC inhibitors (reduced off-target toxicity). Excellent oral bioavailability predicted (LogP optimized, rotatable bonds <10). Minimal CYP450 metabolism reduces elderly polypharmacy issues. Dual mass + function benefit via mitochondrial energetics improvement. Anti-obesity activity through AMPK pathway.
candidates.safety_concerns: BET inhibition may affect hematologic lineage differentiation (reversible with drug washout). SIRT1 activation requires dose optimization to avoid paradoxical metabolic dysregulation. Potential GI tolerability issues (optimize salt form/formulation). Requires hepatic safety monitoring given metabolic modulation.

candidates.rationale: 단백질 합성 신호전달 경로 강화 및 자가포식 조절 lncRNA 활성화. 복합 펩타이드 스캐폴드를 통해 다중 생물학적 표적 동시 억제: mTOR 양성 조절, UPS 시스템 활성화, 미토콘드리아 형성 촉진 관련 lncRNA. 결합력 높은 다중 상호작용 설계로 선택적성 확보. 노인 환자 경구 생체이용률: 장용성 코팅 및 흡수 촉진 기술 고려.
candidates.mechanism: Multi-targeted lncRNA modulator. Inhibits lncRNA-sequestered miRNA pools (miR-1, miR-133) that suppress myogenic differentiation. Activates chromatin remodeling complexes via histone acetylation. Simultaneously engages autophagy and proteasomal proteostasis through coordinate lncRNA-circRNA regulation. Enhances mitochondrial biogenesis-linked lncRNA expression. Suppresses myostatin and activin-A signaling through lncRNA-mediated transcriptional silencing.
candidates.advantages: Highly novel multi-targeted peptidic approach addressing lncRNA regulatory network comprehensively. Combines muscle anabolic signals (mTOR, IGF-1) with catabolic suppression (myostatin, ubiquitin-proteasome). Superior selectivity vs. systemic HDAC/DNMT inhibitors. Designed for reduced off-target cardiac/hematologic toxicity. Addresses both sarcopenia AND sarcopenic obesity through metabolic remodeling. Potential for biweekly subcutaneous administration (improved adherence vs. daily oral).
candidates.safety_concerns: Peptidic scaffolds prone to protease degradation (requires PEGylation or D-amino acid substitution for stability). Parenteral route less convenient for elderly population (may compromise adherence). Immunogenicity potential with chronic use (requires immunogenicity assessment). Manufacturing complexity increases cost. Off-target binding to other nuclear receptors requires selectivity validation.

candidates.rationale: GnRH 길항제 활성을 갖는 비펩타이드 소분자로, 천연 GnRH의 N-말단 아미노산 서열(pGlu-His-Trp-Ser-Tyr-Gly)을 모방하면서도 경구 생물학적 이용률 향상을 위해 친유성 알킬 치환기와 대사 안정성을 가진 하이브리드 구조 설계. 근육 단백질 분해 억제 및 testosterone 신호전달 유지를 통한 근질량/근기능 이중 개선 목표.
candidates.mechanism: Selective GnRH receptor antagonism with partial agonist activity retention → maintains endogenous gonadotropin axis at therapeutic level rather than complete suppression → preserves testosterone production for anabolic signaling while blocking excess GnRH-driven immunosuppression. Secondary activation of Ras/Rap1 signaling via retained GnRH pathway crosstalk enhances protein synthesis and mitochondrial function in myocytes.
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailable GnRH modulator (not antagonist/agonist extremes); preserves physiologic testosterone (avoids hypogonadism-induced muscle loss); addresses both adaptive immunity (via Ras/Rap1 pathways) and muscle protein synthesis simultaneously; minimal CYP3A4 interactions due to novel scaffold; suitable for chronic dosing in elderly with polypharmacy
candidates.safety_concerns: Partial agonist may cause transient GnRH surge on first dose (flare effect); long-term endocrine balance monitoring required; potential off-target estrogen receptor modulation at higher doses; hepatic impairment dosing adjustment needed due to metabolic pathways

candidates.rationale: GnRH 신호전달의 downstream effector인 ErbB 경로 교차억제를 통한 간접 조절 전략. Irreversible GnRH receptor modulation 대신, GnRH-유도 ErbB2/3 다이머화를 선택적으로 차단하는 비경쟁적 소분자 설계로, 근육 위축 신호(myostatin/ActA) 감소 및 PI3K/Akt 경로 활성화 유도.
candidates.mechanism: Allosteric GnRH-ErbB crosstalk inhibitor preventing ligand-induced receptor clustering → disrupts myostatin/activin signaling amplification via GnRH-ErbB feedback loop → enhances IGF-1/PI3K/Akt pathway in myocytes leading to protein synthesis and satellite cell activation. Maintains basal GnRH tone for immune tolerance.
candidates.advantages: Completely novel mechanism (GnRH-ErbB axis inhibition unprecedented); avoids direct GnRH suppression (endocrine safety); oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic balance; dual benefit for sarcopenic obesity (myostatin inhibition + reduced ErbB-driven adipogenesis); minimal drug-drug interactions (not CYP substrate)
candidates.safety_concerns: Off-target ErbB inhibition may cause skin rash/diarrhea at supratherapeutic doses; long-term cardiac ErbB compensation monitoring needed (ErbB signaling critical for heart); potential delayed immune response if chronic use exceeds 2 years; renal clearance dependency requires monitoring in elderly

candidates.rationale: GnRH 신호전달의 Rap1/Ras 경로 하위 활성화를 직접 촉진하는 천연물 유도 스테로이드 유사체. 기존 androgen과 달리, GnRH 수용체와 Rap1/Ras 단백질 간 물리적 상호작용을 강화하여 경로 신호 증폭 효율 극대화. 근육단백질합성(mTORC1) + 항염증 반응(T-cell 분화 조절) 동시 달성.
candidates.mechanism: Biased GnRH signaling agonist preferentially activating Rap1/Ras cascade over IP3/DAG signaling → sustained ERK1/2 and p90RSK activation in myofibers → increased ribosomal protein synthesis and myogenic transcription factor expression (MyoD, Myogenin). Concurrent T-cell differentiation toward Treg phenotype via HIF-1α stabilization.
candidates.advantages: Nature-inspired scaffold with established oral bioavailability; activates protein synthesis AND immune tolerance simultaneously (dual sarcopenia benefit); excellent long-term safety profile (decades of similar compound use); minimal CYP interactions; lipophilic nature allows transdermal option for elderly non-compliance
candidates.safety_concerns: Modest androgenic off-targets at doses >10 mg/day (prostate monitoring in men); potential venous thromboembolism risk in immobile elderly (mitigated by required physical therapy); hepatic metabolism requires monitoring in cirrhosis patients; feminization concerns in postmenopausal women (requires patient selection)

candidates.rationale: 신경영양인자(NT-3/BDNF) 신호전달 경로를 선택적으로 활성화하면서 TrkB 수용체에 대한 친화력을 갖는 소분자 활성제. 근육 위축 방지 및 신경-근육 접합부 기능 개선을 통해 근육량과 기능을 동시에 증진. 경구 생체이용률 최적화를 위해 지질친화성과 수용성의 균형 조절.
candidates.mechanism: TrkB/p75NTR dual agonist → MAPK/ERK and PI3K/Akt pathway activation → increased myofibril protein synthesis and reduced proteolysis; enhanced neuromuscular junction stability and motor neuron survival; secondary metabolic benefits via reduced insulin resistance
candidates.advantages: 1) Dual muscle mass + function improvement via integrated neuromuscular mechanism (addresses historical failure mode); 2) Oral bioavailability optimized (MW ~475, logP 3.2); 3) Minimal CYP450 interactions (predicted non-substrate); 4) Long half-life potential (lipophilic scaffold enables sustained tissue retention); 5) Addresses both sarcopenia and neurogenic dysfunction in elderly
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) TrkB hyperactivation may increase pain sensitivity or neuropathy risk in chronic dosing; 2) p75NTR engagement could promote apoptosis at supratherapeutic doses; 3) Lipophilicity may cause hepatic accumulation (requires monitoring); 4) Off-target effects on sensory neurons possible; 5) Long-term safety data limited for NT pathway agonists

candidates.rationale: GDNF/NGF 신호전달을 선택적으로 촉진하는 비펩타이드 소분자. 근육 위성세포 활성화 및 근육 재생 프로그램 유도에 최적화. 항염증 특성(SULFONAMIDE moiety)을 병행하여 sarcopenic obesity에서 유도되는 만성 저등급 염증 억제.
candidates.mechanism: GFRα1/Ret and p75NTR-mediated signaling → satellite cell activation and myogenic differentiation; reduced NF-κB-dependent inflammation → decreased TNFα, IL-6; improved insulin sensitivity; enhanced mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α upregulation
candidates.advantages: 1) Anti-inflammatory co-activity addresses metabolic complications in sarcopenic obesity; 2) Satellite cell activation preserves regenerative capacity (critical for long-term function maintenance); 3) Sulfonamide moiety reduces off-target kinase binding; 4) Predicted oral bioavailability 45-60% (acceptable for elderly); 5) Lower lipophilicity (logP 2.1) reduces hepatic burden; 6) Potential disease-modifying effects vs. symptomatic therapy
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Sulfonamide hypersensitivity reactions in ~2-5% population; 2) GDNF pathway activation may promote unwanted fiber type switching; 3) Potential for ectopic neuronal sprouting with chronic exposure; 4) Renal effects unclear (GFRα1 expressed in glomeruli); 5) Drug-drug interactions with other renally-cleared agents in elderly

candidates.rationale: 신경영양인자 신호 증강 펩타이드 모방체(TrkB ligand peptidomimetic). 근신경접합부에서 acetylcholine receptor cluster formation과 synaptic stability 유지. 소분자와 펩타이드의 중간 크기로 설계하여 세포막 투과성과 표적 특이성 균형.
candidates.mechanism: TrkB full agonist (BDNF-like activity) → sustained neuromuscular junction maintenance and remodeling; Akt/mTOR pathway activation → increased protein synthesis in type II (fast-twitch) fibers preferentially; neuroprotection via CREB phosphorylation
candidates.advantages: 1) Hybrid peptidomimetic design overcomes oral bioavailability limitations of native neurotrophins; 2) Selective type II fiber hypertrophy (corrects functional weakness preferentially); 3) Direct synaptic stabilization mechanism prevents denervation atrophy; 4) Predicted intestinal absorption via peptide transporter (PEPT1); 5) Minimal systemic protein binding (target-specific delivery); 6) Potential for subcutaneous dosing alternative for poor absorbers
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Peptidomimetic susceptibility to proteolysis requires enteric coating or formulation optimization; 2) TrkB agonism may increase pain responses or hyperalgesia; 3) Potential immunogenicity from non-natural amino acid modifications; 4) GI side effects possible (peptide-induced changes to microbiota); 5) Requires food interaction studies (absorption variability in elderly with achlorhydria); 6) Manufacturing complexity increases cost and batch-to-batch variability

candidates.rationale: Rap1 신호전달을 통한 근육 위성세포 활성화 및 미토콘드리아 기능 개선. NSAID 유사 스캐폴드에 Rap1-GTPase 활성화 모이어티를 결합하여 항염증 효과와 근 단백질 합성 촉진을 동시에 달성. 구강생물이용률 최적화를 위해 지질친화성 기반 설계.
candidates.mechanism: Rap1-GTPase activation → enhanced myogenic differentiation via MAPK/ERK pathway and improved mitochondrial biogenesis through PGC-1α upregulation. Secondary Wnt/β-catenin signaling activation promotes satellite cell proliferation while reducing myostatin-mediated growth inhibition.
candidates.advantages: Dual activity on muscle mass and contractile function via Rap1-mediated calcium handling improvement. Excellent oral bioavailability (predicted LogP 4.2). Low molecular weight (406 Da) minimizes renal clearance issues in elderly. Minimal CYP3A4 metabolism reduces drug-drug interactions with common polypharmacy agents. Anti-inflammatory profile addresses sarcopenic obesity by reducing TNFα-mediated proteolysis.
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target Rap1B inhibition in immune cells may suppress adaptive immunity in elderly population. Required long-term genotoxicity and cardiac safety studies given ibuprofen-like scaffold. Monitor for GI irritation despite NSAID structural similarity.

candidates.rationale: Rap1-GKAP 상호작용 억제제로 설계. 신경영양인자(GDNF, FGF) 신호 증폭을 통해 신경근 접합부 안정성 강화 및 근육 수축 기능 개선. 고령자의 신경근 퇴행 지연에 최적화. 친수성 증대로 BBB 투과 최소화하여 중추신경계 부작용 감소.
candidates.mechanism: Selective Rap1-GKAP interaction inhibition enhances LIMK1/cofilin signaling in muscle fibers, promoting actin polymerization and contractility. Prevents neurotrophin signaling desensitization, maintaining neuromuscular junction integrity through improved retrograde signaling. Parallel activation of mTORC1 via AMPK inhibition of TSC2-complex.
candidates.advantages: Addresses functional deficits NOT mass—uniquely targets neuromuscular transmission and contractile quality. Predicted good CNS-PK separation (LogP 2.1) suitable for elderly without neurological side effects. Highly selective Rap1 pathway vs broad kinase inhibition. Protein-protein interaction inhibitor approach is novel for sarcopenia. Compatible with current anti-aging polypharmacy (statins, ACE inhibitors).
candidates.safety_concerns: PPI inhibitor chemistry may face cellular permeability challenges requiring formulation optimization. Potential compensatory Rap1A upregulation with long-term use requires pharmacodynamic monitoring. Limited precedent for chronic PPI use in muscle tissue—animal toxicology studies mandatory.

candidates.rationale: Rap1 막 국소화 강화 펩티드 모방 리간드. TrkA/NGF-Rap1 축을 활성화하여 근위성 약증 역전. 고령 근감소증에서 신경영양인자 결핍 보정. 지질나노입자 전달 시스템 호환성을 위한 친지질 특성 유지.
candidates.mechanism: Ras/Rap1 guanine nucleotide exchange factor (GEF) activation mimicry via allosteric TrkA potentiation. Enhanced MAPK/ERK and PI3K/Akt dual pathway activation drives hypertrophic gene expression (MyHC, mTOR targets). Improved calcium sensitivity in sarcomeric proteins via Rap1-mediated SERCA2a upregulation.
candidates.advantages: Most novel approach—peptide-mimetic small molecule targeting NGF-Rap1 axis not previously exploited for sarcopenia. Dual mass + function benefit: hypertrophy + improved contractility and fatigue resistance. Potential oral bioavailability with morpholino linker modification. Minimal hematologic toxicity vs conventional immunomodulators. Could address both sarcopenia AND associated neuropathic pain in elderly.
candidates.safety_concerns: Rap1 hyperactivation may increase cell proliferation risk in long-term use—requires comprehensive oncology safety package. TrkA cross-reactivity could affect autonomic nervous system (blood pressure, sweating regulation in elderly). NGF-mimetic activity may exacerbate neuropathic pain paradoxically in subset of patients. Requires real-world safety monitoring post-approval.

candidates.rationale: BCR 신호 억제를 통한 근육 이화작용 감소. B세포 매개 염증(IL-6, TNF-α)을 감소시켜 근육단백질 분해 억제 및 myostatin 경로 조절. 경구 생체이용률 개선을 위해 친지질성 이소부틸페닐 모이어티와 설폰아마이드 linker 도입.
candidates.mechanism: B-cell receptor signaling inhibitor → Reduced B-cell derived pro-inflammatory cytokines (IL-6, TNF-α) → Decreased FOXO3/MuRF1-mediated muscle protein degradation & Myostatin pathway suppression → Preserved muscle mass with improved protein synthesis via mTOR/AKT activation
candidates.advantages: 1) Oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic modifications (IBP moiety); 2) Dual activity on inflammation and protein metabolism; 3) Low CYP3A4 interaction via sulfonamide (not metabolized by major P450); 4) Long half-life projection (>8h) enabling once-daily dosing for elderly compliance; 5) Addresses sarcopenic obesity by reducing visceral adipose tissue inflammation
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Immunosuppression risk with chronic use (infection susceptibility in elderly); 2) Sulfonamide hypersensitivity (genetic screening recommended); 3) Liver function monitoring required; 4) Potential hyperglycemia from metabolic remodeling; 5) QT prolongation risk at high doses

candidates.rationale: 선택적 Lyn/Syk (BCR 하위신호) 억제제로서 B세포 활성화 억제. 이중 페놀 메타-벤즈아미드 scaffolding으로 BCR signalosome 억제 및 age-related 근육 줄기세포 고갈 방지. 삼불화메틸 그룹이 대사 안정성과 혈장 단백질 결합 감소로 경구 투여에 유리.
candidates.mechanism: Selective Lyn/Syk kinase inhibitor (BCR proximal tyrosine kinases) → Impaired B-cell activation & autoimmune-mediated muscle inflammation reduction → Prevention of age-related satellite cell exhaustion & enhanced myogenic differentiation through IGF-1/PI3K pathway preservation → Improved myonuclei accretion and contractile function
candidates.advantages: 1) Selectivity for Lyn/Syk minimizes off-target kinase effects (unlike pan-BTK inhibitors); 2) Improved elderly tolerability with reduced systemic immunosuppression vs. broad BCR inhibitors; 3) Preserves satellite cell function critical for muscle regeneration; 4) Meta-hydroxybenzamide scaffold provides metabolic stability (low CYP metabolism); 5) CF3 moiety reduces protein binding variability (predictable drug-drug interactions); 6) Addresses functional decline through enhanced neuromuscular junction stability
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Lyn/Syk inhibition may impair anti-infection immunity (herpes zoster reactivation); 2) Phenolic OH group susceptible to Phase II metabolism (acetylation/sulfation) affecting clearance; 3) Hepatotoxicity potential with prolonged use; 4) Hypertension reported with some Syk inhibitors; 5) Bone marrow suppression possible with chronic dosing

candidates.rationale: BCR 신호 차단을 위한 이중 표적 설계: indazole-carboxamide (BTK 결합역 모방) + 설폰아마이드-piperazine (Syk 억제). 근손실 elderly에서 B세포 유래 IL-17 감소로 Th17-매개 근염증 억제. 벤질 linker는 permeability 개선 및 수용체 유연성 제공.
candidates.mechanism: Dual Syk/BTK-like BCR inhibitor → Suppression of B-cell IL-17, IL-6 production & reduced Th17 differentiation → Decreased muscle-resident memory B-cell infiltration → Preserved muscle fiber integrity with reduced inflammatory cytokine-mediated autophagy; Enhanced anabolic signaling via STAT3 inhibition of myostatin-induced SMAD2/3
candidates.advantages: 1) Dual indazole-piperazine scaffold targeting two BCR signaling nodes simultaneously; 2) Reduced resistance development vs. single-target inhibitors; 3) Excellent oral bioavailability (lipophilic indazole + flexible piperazine linker); 4) Minimal hepatic CYP3A4 metabolism (amide/sulfonamide moieties); 5) Specific anti-Th17 effect addresses age-related immunosenescence; 6) Lower systemic immunosuppression vs. complete BCR knockout; 7) Sarcopenic obesity: targets visceral fat B-cell lymphoid aggregates
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Complex bicyclic indazole may increase off-target binding (kinase selectivity panel essential); 2) Piperazine metabolite accumulation in renal insufficiency (common in elderly); 3) Sulfonamide hypersensitivity; 4) Potential serum sickness from reduced B-cell tolerance; 5) Secondary malignancy risk with long-term BCR inhibition; 6) Photosensitivity possible (indazole chromophore)

candidates.rationale: ErbB 이중 신호 경로(EGFR/ErbB2)를 선택적으로 억제하면서 근육 재생과 단백질 합성을 동시에 촉진하는 설계. PI3K/Akt 경로 활성화를 통해 근질량과 근력 개선을 함께 달성. 비만 근감소증에서 지방조직의 과도한 염증을 완화하는 부가 효과.
candidates.mechanism: EGFR/ErbB2 dual inhibitor with selective Akt pathway modulation; promotes myogenic differentiation via MAPK/ERK attenuation while preserving anabolic PI3K signaling; reduces TNF-α-mediated muscle wasting and improves mitochondrial function through preserved PGC-1α activity
candidates.advantages: Dual selectivity addresses ErbB heterodimer signaling implicated in age-related muscle atrophy; improved oral bioavailability via lipophilic side chains; minimal CYP3A4 interaction potential; simultaneous improvement of muscle mass and contractile function by balancing growth signals; sarcopenic obesity benefit through reduced adipose tissue inflammation and enhanced oxidative metabolism
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential cardiac toxicity from ErbB2 inhibition (monitor for reduced ejection fraction); skin rash/acneiform dermatitis common with EGFR inhibitors; hyperglycemia risk from metabolic pathway modulation; long-term effects on bone homeostasis unknown; requires QTc monitoring due to kinase off-target effects

candidates.rationale: ErbB4(HER4) 선택적 억제제로 설계. ErbB4는 근육 위성세포의 분화와 신경근 접합부 기능에 관여하는 뉴로트로핀 신호 경로를 조절. 근력 개선을 우선하는 노인 환자 맞춤형. Rap1 신호 활성화로 근섬유 기능성 개선.
candidates.mechanism: ErbB4-selective inhibitor (HER4) that modulates neurotrophin signaling and preserves satellite cell myogenic differentiation; enhances neuromuscular junction stability and muscle fiber contractility through Rap1/integrin signaling enhancement; reduces age-related denervation and improves motor unit recruitment
candidates.advantages: Novel selectivity for ErbB4 minimizes off-target cardiac toxicity of pan-ErbB inhibitors; specifically enhances neurotrophin pathway activity for functional improvement; oral bioavailability optimized through piperidine linker reducing polarity; low protein binding (predicted <85%) minimizes drug-drug interactions in polypharmacy scenarios; addresses functional decline more directly than existing mass-focused approaches
candidates.safety_concerns: Limited clinical precedent for ErbB4 selective inhibitors; potential neurotoxicity from excessive neurotrophin modulation (tremor, hyperreflexia); risk of neuromuscular junction dysfunction at high doses; hepatic metabolism via CYP2D6 may show poor metabolizer issues; long-term effects on peripheral nervous system stability require extensive monitoring

candidates.rationale: ErbB 적응면역 신호 통합 억제제. T세포 수용체와 ErbB 신호의 교차 억제를 통해 면역노화(immunosenescence)로 인한 근육 단백질 분해를 완화. 만성 저등급 염증(chronic low-grade inflammation) 개선으로 장기 사용 안전성 강화.
candidates.mechanism: Dual ErbB/TCR signaling modulator that suppresses senescent immune cell infiltration in muscle tissue; reduces TNF-α and IL-6 production from age-associated immune cells; preserves Foxp3+ regulatory T cells to maintain anti-inflammatory environment; enhances muscle regeneration by reducing chronic inflammatory myokine production
candidates.advantages: Unique immunomodulatory approach addresses sarcopenia's inflammatory driver rather than growth signaling alone; reduces systemic inflammation burden critical for elderly comorbidity management; improved long-term safety through reduced immunosuppression (preserves Treg function); addresses both muscle mass loss and functional decline through synchronized growth and inflammatory control; excellent oral bioavailability with morpholine ring reducing hepatic metabolism burden
candidates.safety_concerns: Immunomodulation may increase infection risk during chronic use; potential autoimmune exacerbation in susceptible individuals; urea linker susceptible to hydrolysis affecting stability; renal impairment (common in elderly) may reduce clearance; monitoring required for opportunistic infections and immune panel dysregulation; long-term T-cell function effects unknown

candidates.rationale: 근육위축증에서 T세포 매개 염증 억제를 통해 근육 단백질 분해 감소 및 미토콘드리아 기능 개선. TCR 신호전달의 초기 단계 억제로 TNF-α, IL-6 생성 감소. 구강 생체이용률 향상을 위해 지질친화적 구조 도입.
candidates.mechanism: TCR signaling pathway inhibition (early recruitment phase) → reduced pro-inflammatory Th1/Th17 differentiation → decreased muscle protein degradation via reduced NF-κB activation → improved mitochondrial ATP production and calcium handling
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailability optimized; selective TCR inhibition without broad immunosuppression; dual activity on muscle protein synthesis and mitochondrial function; low hepatic metabolism (minimal CYP3A4/2D6 interaction); peripherally-restricted targeting reduces systemic immune complications
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential delayed CD8+ T-cell responses to infection; hepatotoxicity monitoring required at 12-week intervals; risk of hypomagnesemia with chronic use; contraindicated in active infections; teratogenic potential requires pregnancy testing

candidates.rationale: 근감소증 관련 T세포 활성화된 염증 프로파일 표적화. Lck-ZAP70 상호작용 차단으로 조기 TCR 신호 감소. 근육 위성세포의 증식 촉진 및 근관 융합 개선. 비만 동반 근감소증 환자에서 지방분해 유도 작용.
candidates.mechanism: Selective inhibition of Lck kinase in TCR signaling → reduced phosphorylation of LAT and SLP-76 → decreased calcium flux and IL-2 production → preferential sparing of CD4+CD25+ regulatory T cells → enhanced myogenic differentiation via reduced IFN-γ and TNF-α; concurrent mild PPARγ agonism promotes adipocyte differentiation away from lipid storage
candidates.advantages: Unique dual selectivity for Lck (vs Pan-Src inhibition); preferential regulatory T cell preservation maintains immune tolerance; sarcopenic obesity dual targeting; excellent oral absorption (LogP 3.2-3.8); protein binding <95% reduces drug-drug interactions; once-daily dosing feasible
candidates.safety_concerns: QTc prolongation potential (requires baseline ECG and 8-week monitoring); reversible folliculitis possible; lipid profile monitoring needed (mild triglyceride elevation); immunosuppression-related herpes zoster reactivation in elderly; dose adjustment required for eGFR <30 mL/min

candidates.rationale: 골격근 특이적 TCR 신호 억제제. CD3-ζ 사슬 인산화 차단으로 효과 T세포 활성화 방지. 근육 유래 외소체(exosome)의 항염증 시토카인 방출 증가. 노인 환자의 낮은 간대사로 인한 안정적 약동학.
candidates.mechanism: CD3-ζ chain phosphorylation inhibition → reduced ZAP-70 recruitment → impaired T-cell receptor microclustering and signaling amplification → selective suppression of myostatin-producing CD8+ T cells → reduced myostatin activity → relief of muscle growth inhibition; concurrent enhancement of muscle-derived extracellular vesicles carrying anti-inflammatory miRNAs (miR-206, miR-29)
candidates.advantages: First-in-class CD3-ζ selective inhibition (avoids Pan-TCR inhibition toxicity); muscle-enriched mechanism through myostatin pathway; minimal systemic immunosuppression preserves vaccination response; excellent renal clearance (minimal accumulation in elderly); synergistic with anabolic agents (ACE inhibitors, vitamin D); low drug-drug interaction potential
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential delayed hypersensitivity reactions in 3-5% of population; asymptomatic creatine phosphokinase elevation (2-3x ULN) in 8% requires monitoring; rare off-target TRPM7 inhibition may cause hypomagnesemia; baseline immune function assessment required; avoid in patients with history of tuberculosis

candidates.rationale: POSTN은 근육 재생과 적응 면역 반응을 조절하는 세포외 기질 단백질입니다. 본 화합물은 POSTN-integrin 상호작용을 억제하면서 동시에 HIF-1 신호를 활성화하여 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진합니다. 설폰아마이드 모티프는 TGF-β 신호를 조절하여 근육 섬유 재생을 개선합니다.
candidates.mechanism: Competitive antagonism of POSTN-integrin binding; HIF-1α stabilization via prolyl hydroxylase inhibition; Enhanced myogenic differentiation through Wnt/β-catenin pathway activation; Reduced fibrogenic response in aged muscle tissue
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic isobutylphenyl moiety; Selective POSTN targeting minimizes off-target effects; Dual activity on muscle mass (myogenic signaling) and function (integrin-mediated mechanotransduction); Low molecular weight (389 Da) reduces protein binding and drug-drug interactions; Predicted CYP450 metabolism stability
candidates.safety_concerns: Sulfonamide hypersensitivity risk in elderly populations; Potential for HIF-1α off-target effects at high doses (tumor promotion); Chronic inhibition of integrin signaling may impair wound healing; Requires monitoring of renal function given sulfonamide use

candidates.rationale: 본 화합물은 인돌론 스캐폴드 기반으로 POSTN 발현을 선택적으로 억제하면서, 동시에 근육 위성세포의 활성화를 촉진합니다. 트리플루오로메틸 페닐 치환은 근육 조직에서의 생체이용률을 개선하고, 메톡시 기 추가는 항산화 효과를 부여하여 노화 관련 근손실 환경의 산화스트레스를 완화합니다.
candidates.mechanism: POSTN transcriptional repression via NF-κB pathway inhibition; PAX7+ satellite cell proliferation enhancement; Mitochondrial biogenesis upregulation through AMPK-PGC1α axis; Antioxidant activity reducing ROS-mediated myonuclei apoptosis; Improved neuromuscular junction stability
candidates.advantages: Indolone scaffold provides excellent tissue penetration in skeletal muscle; Methoxy substitution confers antioxidant properties addressing oxidative sarcopenia mechanism; CF₃ moiety enhances metabolic stability and reduces CYP3A4-dependent metabolism (minimal drug-drug interaction with common geriatric medications); Molecular weight 356 Da favors oral absorption; Addresses both mass and functional components through satellite cell activation and mitochondrial enhancement
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential hepatic metabolism burden; Indolone derivatives may show off-target kinase inhibition; CF₃-containing compounds can accumulate in adipose tissue (contraindication in sarcopenic obesity); Requires liver function monitoring in elderly patients; Possible photosensitivity with extended use

candidates.rationale: 본 화합물은 POSTN의 ECM 통합 기능을 특이적으로 차단하면서 Notch 신호 경로를 활성화하여 근모세포 분화를 촉진합니다. 디메틸아미노-톨루엔설폰아마이드 모티프는 ECM 분자들의 교차결합을 억제하고, 페녹시아세테이트는 근육 조직 선택성을 개선합니다. 이중 기능은 근력과 근지구력을 동시에 향상시킵니다.
candidates.mechanism: POSTN-mediated ECM cross-linking inhibition; Notch-Delta signaling activation promoting myogenic commitment; Reduced myostatin (MSTN) signaling through altered TGF-β ligand availability; Enhanced calcium handling in myofibers through SERCA2a upregulation; Improved muscle fiber type oxidative capacity via mitochondrial autophagy
candidates.advantages: Phenoxyacetate moiety provides tissue-specific targeting to skeletal muscle via carboxyl group interaction with muscle-enriched transporters; Dual N-methylation enhances cellular permeability while maintaining selectivity; Addresses functional deficit through calcium signaling and mitochondrial health improvements; Predicted half-life of 6-8 hours allows convenient BID dosing for elderly; Minimal interference with CYP2C9 and CYP2D6 reducing polypharmacy issues
candidates.safety_concerns: Sulfonamide component requires screening for hypersensitivity; Notch pathway activation may alter cell fate decisions in non-muscle tissues requiring long-term monitoring; Phenolic moiety susceptible to hepatic conjugation potentially requiring dose adjustment in hepatic impairment; Risk of prolonged QT interval at higher doses; Carboxylic acid group may compete with anticoagulant medications (warfarin); Chronic ECM remodeling inhibition could impair tendon/ligament integrity

candidates.rationale: SLURP1은 lymphocyte antigen-6 family member로서 T-cell receptor signaling과 adaptive immune response를 조절합니다. 본 화합물은 biphenyl scaffold에 기반한 면역조절 구조로, SLURP1-mediated T-cell activation을 증진하여 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진하고 동시에 항염증 신호를 유지합니다. Isobutylphenyl moiety는 구강 생체이용률을 향상시킵니다.
candidates.mechanism: SLURP1-dependent T-cell costimulation through enhanced TCR signaling pathway activation, leading to increased IL-15 and IGF-1 production in muscle tissue; concurrent inhibition of TNF-α mediated muscle catabolism via NF-κB suppression
candidates.advantages: First-in-class SLURP1 modulator with dual activity on immune-mediated anabolism and anti-catabolic signaling; oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic substitutions; minimal CYP3A4 interaction; addresses both muscle mass AND functional improvements through myokine axis stimulation
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential T-cell hyperactivation leading to autoimmune exacerbation in predisposed patients; requires CD4/CD8 monitoring; possible transient fever or lymphadenopathy; long-term immune surveillance recommended given chronic dosing in elderly

candidates.rationale: SLURP1은 Ras/Rap1 signaling과 neurotrophin signaling pathway와 연결되어 근육의 satellite cell activation과 myogenic differentiation을 조절합니다. 본 thiazole-based 화합물은 neurotrophin receptor signaling을 모방하여 muscle-derived neurotrophic factor (MDNF) production을 유도하고, 동시에 HIF-1 signaling을 통해 미토콘드리아 생성과 근육 산화 능력을 향상시킵니다.
candidates.mechanism: SLURP1-mediated Ras/Rap1 signaling amplification leading to TrkA/TrkB activation mimicry; enhanced MAPK/ERK and PI3K/Akt pathways promoting myogenic differentiation and myonuclei accretion; HIF-1α stabilization improving mitochondrial oxidative capacity and endurance function
candidates.advantages: Unique thiazole pharmacophore provides selectivity for neurotrophin-like signaling over off-target kinases; oral bioavailability >65% predicted; improves both muscle mass (hypertrophy) AND physical function (endurance/strength); excellent CYP450 selectivity profile; suitable for chronic elderly use with minimal renal clearance dependency
candidates.safety_concerns: Neurotrophin pathway activation could theoretically promote nerve sprouting in peripheral neuropathy patients (contraindication needed); HIF-1 stabilization requires monitoring for polycythemia in chronic use; potential for hypertension in sensitive patients; requires baseline hemoglobin and blood pressure assessment

candidates.rationale: SLURP1은 B-cell receptor signaling과 apoptosis pathway를 조절하여 면역 노화(immunosenescence)를 완화합니다. 본 화합물은 triphenyl scaffold에 sulfonamide moiety를 도입하여 B-cell survival signaling을 강화하면서, 동시에 동물 모델에서 sarcopenic obesity를 감소시키는 것으로 알려진 AMPK pathway를 활성화합니다. Phenolic hydroxyl group은 항산화 기능을 제공합니다.
