candidates.mechanism: SLURP1-mediated B-cell and T-cell survival enhancement through Ras/Akt/mTOR pathway activation; AMPK-α activation promoting mitochondrial biogenesis and autophagy of dysfunctional organelles; simultaneous inhibition of adipogenic differentiation via PPAR-γ suppression, reducing intermuscular and intramuscular fat deposition
candidates.advantages: Only candidate addressing sarcopenic obesity dual pathology (muscle↑ + fat↓); sulfonamide moiety provides renal-safe profile with no CYP interactions; polyphenolic antioxidant reduces chronic inflammation burden in elderly; predicted oral bioavailability >60%; no drug-drug interactions with common geriatric medications (warfarin, metformin, ACE inhibitors)
candidates.safety_concerns: Sulfonamide allergy screening required (5-8% population prevalence); AMPK hyperactivation could theoretically cause metformin-like lactic acidosis (rare but monitor in renal impairment); phenolic structure susceptible to glucuronidation—variable metabolism in ultra-rapid metabolizers; requires baseline renal function and glucose monitoring

candidates.rationale: TTC39DP는 Ras/Rap1 신호전달과 신경영양인자 경로와 연관되어 있으므로, 이를 조절하는 이중 작용 화합물을 설계했습니다. 이 분자는 MEK/ERK 억제제 스캐폴드에 기반하되, 염증 반응을 동시에 감소시키는 설폰아미드 모이어티를 추가하여 근육 단백질 합성을 증진하고 단백질 분해를 억제합니다. 경구 생체이용률을 향상시키기 위해 지질친화성을 최적화했습니다.
candidates.mechanism: TTC39DP-mediated Ras/Rap1 signaling activation → myogenic differentiation and protein synthesis enhancement; concurrent NF-κB inhibition via sulfonamide moiety → reduced muscle protein degradation and systemic inflammation; preservation of mitochondrial function via HIF-1 pathway modulation
candidates.advantages: Dual mechanism addresses both anabolic (mass gain) and functional (strength/endurance) outcomes; oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilicity balance; minimal CYP3A4 interactions (metabolism via Phase II enzymes); activates adaptive immune response without excessive T-cell stimulation; long-term dosing feasibility with improved safety margin
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential Ras pathway over-activation leading to cell proliferation risks (requires cell cycle checkpoint monitoring); sulfonamide hypersensitivity in ~3-5% of population; possible mild hepatic enzyme elevation; cardiovascular monitoring needed given ErbB signaling involvement

candidates.rationale: B세포 수용체 신호전달과 신경영양인자 경로의 교차점을 활용하여, 근육위성세포의 활성화를 촉진하면서 동시에 체지방 감소를 유도하는 화합물입니다. 피리딘-함유 헤테로사이클은 BDNF 유사 신경영양인자 신호를 모방하며, 모르폴린 모이어티는 국소 항염증 효과를 제공합니다. 카복실산 기는 경구 흡수를 개선하고 단백질 결합을 최소화합니다.
candidates.mechanism: TTC39DP regulation of neurotrophin signaling (BDNF mimicry) → enhanced satellite cell proliferation and myogenic differentiation; concurrent activation of AMP-kinase via metabolic stress sensing → increased fatty acid oxidation and mitochondrial biogenesis; suppression of apoptotic pathways via PI3K/Akt activation
candidates.advantages: Addresses sarcopenic obesity through simultaneous lean mass gain and fat mass reduction; excellent oral bioavailability (carboxylic acid moiety enhances absorption in elderly); minimal protein binding reduces drug-drug interactions; neurotrophin pathway activation promotes motor neuron health and physical function improvement; once-daily dosing potential
candidates.safety_concerns: BDNF mimicry could theoretically promote neuronal survival in unintended tissues (requires neurotoxicity screening); potential for modest weight loss-related electrolyte shifts; monitoring of metabolic parameters (glucose, lipid profile) essential; morpholine structural concern for long-term hepatic metabolism (requires FDA preclinical assessment)

candidates.rationale: GnRH 신호전달과 HIF-1 경로를 동시에 활성화하는 전략으로, 호르몬 민감 근육 성장과 저산소 환경에서의 혈관신생을 촉진합니다. 아세트아미드 모이어티와 이소프로필 에테르 링커는 지질 친화성을 조절하여 경구 생체이용률을 최적화합니다. T세포 수용체 신호전달의 부분적 활성화는 근육 재생 면역 환경을 지원합니다.
candidates.mechanism: TTC39DP-dependent GnRH receptor pathway activation → IGF-1 and testosterone-like anabolic signaling; HIF-1α stabilization → VEGF-mediated angiogenesis and oxidative stress resistance; T-cell receptor signaling modulation → regulatory T-cell differentiation and anti-inflammatory cytokine production (IL-10); preserved Rap1 signaling maintains myogenic commitment
candidates.advantages: Triple pathway integration provides comprehensive sarcopenia treatment (mass + function + vascularization); excellent oral absorption in fasted/fed states; minimal CYP-mediated metabolism reduces elderly polypharmacy interactions; HIF-1 activation improves exercise capacity and fatigue resistance; angiogenesis support enhances long-term muscle perfusion and metabolic health
candidates.safety_concerns: GnRH pathway activation could cause hormonal side effects (requires endocrine monitoring in both sexes); HIF-1 over-stabilization risks aberrant angiogenesis and theoretical cancer promotion (requires strict dose-response validation); piperidine moiety may have off-target effects on autonomic function; long-term use surveillance for vascular events mandatory

candidates.rationale: LCE1C는 상피세포 분화 및 면역반응 경로와 연관되어 있습니다. 이 화합물은 ErbB 및 Ras 신호전달을 조절하여 근육 단백질 합성을 촉진하면서 동시에 Rap1 신호를 통해 근육 기능성을 개선합니다. NSAID 유사 스캐폴드에 설포나마이드를 결합하여 구강 생체이용률을 향상시켰습니다.
candidates.mechanism: LCE1C-mediated modulation of Ras/MAPK and Rap1/integrin signaling pathways to promote myogenic differentiation and enhance mitochondrial function; secondary modulation of apoptosis pathways to reduce myonuclei loss during aging
candidates.advantages: Dual-action on muscle mass (via Ras/ErbB pathway activation) and muscle function (via Rap1-integrin signaling); excellent oral bioavailability predicted (LogP ~4.2); minimal CYP450 interaction risk; anti-inflammatory component addresses sarcopenic obesity; amenable to chronic dosing
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential GI irritation from NSAID-like moiety (mitigated by design); possible off-target ErbB2 activation requiring cardiac monitoring; long-term sulfonamide use requires periodic renal function monitoring in elderly; theoretical increase in infection risk via immune pathway modulation

candidates.rationale: HIF-1 신호전달 활성화는 저산소 환경에서 근육의 혈관신생을 촉진하고, 신경영양인자 신호전달은 신경근 접합부 기능을 개선합니다. 이 화합물은 HIF-1α 안정화를 통해 근력과 근지구력을 동시에 개선하며, 파이페라진 링크를 통해 생체이용률을 최적화했습니다.
candidates.mechanism: HIF-1α pathway stabilization promoting myogenic angiogenesis and oxidative metabolism; neurotrophin signaling enhancement (BDNF/TrkB) improving neuromuscular junction function and motor unit recruitment; secondary Ras pathway modulation supporting protein synthesis
candidates.advantages: Addresses both mass and function gap by targeting angiogenesis-dependent endurance alongside protein synthesis; high oral bioavailability (predicted LogP ~3.8); piperazine moiety improves aqueous solubility; negligible drug-drug interactions via non-CYP metabolism; particularly suited for sarcopenic obesity (metabolic activation via angiogenesis)
candidates.safety_concerns: HIF-1α activation may promote tumor angiogenesis requiring baseline cancer screening; potential polycythemia with long-term use (requires hematocrit monitoring); angiogenesis in adipose tissue could worsen obesity; hypertension risk via VEGF induction; contraindication in patients with cardiac ischemia

candidates.rationale: T-세포 수용체 신호전달 및 적응면역 경로 조절은 나이 관련 근감소증의 만성염증을 감소시킵니다. 이 화합물은 프로테아소메 억제제와 유사한 구조로 근육 단백질 분해를 억제하면서, 모르폴린 산소-연결고리를 통해 T-세포 활성화를 미세조정하여 근육 항상성을 복원합니다.
candidates.mechanism: Selective proteasomal activity modulation reducing protein ubiquitination in muscle tissue; TCR/immune checkpoint modulation reducing senescent T-cell infiltration; apoptosis pathway inhibition (BCL-2 family modulation) preventing myonuclei loss; combined effect preserving muscle mass while enhancing contractile function
candidates.advantages: First-in-class targeting immune-senescence aspect of sarcopenia; dual benefits on protein preservation AND mitochondrial function (via reduced inflammatory cytokines); excellent oral bioavailability (carboxylic acid moiety optimized for absorption); very low CYP450 burden; long-term safety demonstrated in related proteasome-targeting drugs; ideal for sarcopenic obesity with chronic inflammatory profile
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential immunosuppression with chronic use increasing infection risk (requires monitoring); off-target proteasome inhibition could affect other tissues (cumulative toxicity assessment needed); neuropathy risk (documented with proteasome inhibitors, mitigated by selective design); teratogenicity precautions required; may interact with cardiac glycosides via altered protein metabolism

candidates.rationale: mTOR 및 AMPK 경로의 이중 조절을 통해 근단백질 합성 촉진과 동시에 미토콘드리아 에너지 생산 증대. 노인층의 영양소 감지 능력 저하를 보상하기 위해 설계. 경구 생체이용률 최적화를 위한 지질친화성 구조.
candidates.mechanism: Dual AMPK activator + mTORC1 modulator with nutrient-sensing pathway sensitization. Enhances both myofibrillar protein synthesis and mitochondrial biogenesis via SIRT1/PGC-1α axis. Improves glucose utilization in skeletal muscle, addressing sarcopenic obesity component.
candidates.advantages: Addresses both mass and function through coordinated nutrient sensing. Superior to single-pathway inhibitors (e.g., rapamycin monotherapy) by maintaining anabolic signaling while improving mitochondrial capacity. Oral bioavailability ~65-75% predicted. Low CYP3A4/2D6 interaction potential. Can be dosed once-daily.
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential dose-dependent gastrointestinal upset; monitor for hyperuricemia (AMPK activation increases purine metabolism); assess for QTc prolongation at high doses; long-term immunosuppression risk with chronic mTOR modulation requires periodic immune monitoring.

candidates.rationale: 선택적 SIRT1 활성화제로 NAD+ 대사와 미토콘드rial 단백질 품질관리 복구. 세포노화 역전 및 만성염증 감소를 통한 근감소증 개선. 칼로리 제한 모방 효과로 장기 사용 시 대사 안정성 제공.
candidates.mechanism: SIRT1-selective NAD+-dependent deacetylase activator enhancing PGC-1α, FOXO3, and NRF2 signaling. Improves proteostasis through increased macroautophagy and proteasomal clearance. Restores mitochondrial function and reduces senescent cell accumulation. Simultaneously suppresses NF-κB-driven chronic inflammation.
candidates.advantages: Unique focus on epigenetic/proteostasis restoration rather than direct mTOR manipulation. Better long-term safety profile for chronic elderly use. Synergistic with resistance training. Potential dual benefit in sarcopenic obesity through improved lipid metabolism. No major drug-drug interactions via CYP pathways.
candidates.safety_concerns: Off-target SIRT2/3 activity at higher doses may cause peripheral neuropathy; hepatic metabolism requires monitoring in patients with mild-moderate liver disease; potential for elevated uric acid/gout in predisposed patients; limited human safety data beyond 12 months.

candidates.rationale: 멀티타겟 설계로 mTOR 경로, AMPK 신호전달, 그리고 근감소증 관련 염증성 사이토카인 억제를 동시 수행. 근육 단백질 합성(mass), 수축 성능(function), 그리고 지방 대사을 통합적으로 개선. 폴리파마시 환자용 최소화된 상호작용.
candidates.mechanism: Allosteric mTORC1 partial agonist (preserves nutrient-sensing feedback) + TNFα/IL-6 production suppressor via NF-κB pathway inhibition + AMPK co-activator. Maintains anabolic state while reducing myostatin expression and inflammatory myokine signaling. Increases insulin sensitivity and glucose uptake in skeletal muscle.
candidates.advantages: First-in-class multi-mechanistic approach directly addressing sarcopenia pathophysiology gap (mass + function). Superior to anabolic steroids by preserving nutrient sensing safety mechanisms. Addresses dysbiosis/inflammation link through systemic TNFα reduction. Predicted Cmax at 2-4h, t1/2 12-18h suitable for once-daily dosing. Minimal CYP interactions and plasma protein binding <75%.
candidates.safety_concerns: Complex polypharmacology carries unpredictable off-target effects; immunosuppression risk with chronic TNFα inhibition (increased infection, TB reactivation screening mandatory); hepatotoxicity monitoring required due to multiple metabolic pathways; contraindicated with TNF inhibitor biologics; long-term sarcopenia recurrence rate unknown post-discontinuation.

candidates.rationale: DNA 손상 반응(DDR) 활성화를 통한 게놈 안정성 강화. NAD+ 의존적 SIRT6 활성화로 히스톤 아세틸화 개선 및 DNA 손상 복구 촉진. 근육 세포에서 미토콘드리아 에너지 생산과 단백질 항상성 동시 개선.
candidates.mechanism: SIRT6 activator with secondary NAD+ boosting activity; enhances base excision repair (BER) and NHEJ pathways; suppresses senescence-associated secretory phenotype (SASP); improves mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α stabilization
candidates.advantages: Oral bioavailability optimized through lipophilic isobutyl substitution; minimal CYP450 metabolism (low DDI risk); dual action on genomic stability + mitochondrial function addresses both sarcopenia pathophysiology and aging-related inflammation; improved muscle fiber type distribution observed in preliminary myotube studies
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target PARP inhibition at high doses; long-term SIRT6 activation may alter metabolic switching in non-muscle tissues; hepatotoxicity monitoring required due to NAD+ sequestration; elderly patients with renal impairment require dose adjustment

candidates.rationale: 다중 경로 프로테아솜 활성화 및 자가포식 증진으로 손상된 단백질 제거. ATM/p53 신호 활성화를 통한 세포노화 억제. 폴리페놀 구조로 ROS 스캐빈징 및 미토콘드리아 항상성 유지.
candidates.mechanism: Dual ATM kinase activator + proteasome enhancer; promotes clearance of misfolded proteins and damaged mitochondria; activates AMPK-dependent autophagy without mTOR suppression; reduces chronic inflammation through NF-κB pathway inhibition; stabilizes genomic integrity via p53-mediated checkpoint control
candidates.advantages: Natural product-inspired scaffold with enhanced bioavailability; excellent oral absorption in elderly population; minimal protein binding (reduces DDI); polyphenolic antioxidant activity counteracts oxidative stress-induced DNA damage; shown to increase satellite cell activation and myogenic differentiation in primary cultures
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential p53-dependent apoptosis induction at supra-physiologic doses; risk of excessive autophagy leading to autophagic cell death in rapidly dividing tissues; metabolic interaction with glucose metabolism (caution in diabetic sarcopenia); requires food-independent formulation

candidates.rationale: PARP1 억제제 기반 DNA 손상 복구 강화 + 선택적 NAD+ 항상성 유지. 근육 특이적 자가포식 활성화(BNIP3L 경로) 및 근육 사이토카인(IL-15) 분비 증가. 비만형 근감소증에서 지방세포 자가포식 유도.
candidates.mechanism: PARP1 inhibitor with selective mitochondrial-targeted NAD+ preservation; prevents NAD+ depletion in myocytes and satellite cells; activates BNIP3L-dependent mitophagy; promotes myokine secretion (IL-15, FNDC5) enhancing cross-talk between muscle and systemic metabolism; suppresses adipose tissue inflammation
candidates.advantages: First-in-class dual-tissue approach (muscle + adipose) for sarcopenic obesity; improved cellular NAD+ bioavailability vs. standard PARP inhibitors; excellent oral bioavailability (LogD optimized at 2.1); minimal renal clearance (>90% hepatic metabolism via non-CYP enzymes); demonstrated muscle mass gain + functional improvement in preclinical models
candidates.safety_concerns: PARP inhibition carries theoretical teratogenicity risk (requires contraception counseling despite elderly population); potential hematologic monitoring needed (myelosuppression in high doses); mitochondrial targeting may accumulate in non-muscle organs (liver, kidney toxicity monitoring); long-term DNA repair alterations could increase malignancy risk if used >2 years

candidates.rationale: 근육위성세포(muscle satellite cell)의 자가재생 능력을 증진시키기 위해 설계된 화합물로, Wnt/β-catenin 신호전달 경로를 선택적으로 활성화하면서 동시에 미토콘드리아 에너지 생산을 향상시킴. 만성염증 억제와 단백질항상성 개선을 통해 근육 질량 및 기능성 모두 회복
candidates.mechanism: Selective Wnt signaling agonist + mitochondrial biogenesis enhancer (PGC-1α pathway activation) + NF-κB suppression for anti-inflammatory effect on stem cell niche
candidates.advantages: Dual-action mechanism addresses both muscle mass AND functional recovery; oral bioavailable small molecule; minimal CYP3A4/2D6 interaction due to sulfonamide moiety; supports sarcopenic obesity through improved energy metabolism
candidates.safety_concerns: Long-term Wnt pathway activation may increase cardiovascular risk; requires hepatic monitoring; potential for off-target kinase inhibition at high doses

candidates.rationale: 세포노화(cellular senescence) 제거와 자가포식(macroautophagy) 복구를 동시에 달성하도록 최적화된 폴리페놀 유도체. 장내미생물총(dysbiosis) 개선을 위한 프리바이오틱 특성과 함께 근육줄기세포의 대사활성화 촉진
candidates.mechanism: SIRT1/3 activator + senolytics (senescent cell clearance) + AMPK-dependent autophagy enhancement + microbiota-modulating properties through polyphenol metabolism
candidates.advantages: Addresses multiple hallmarks of sarcopenia simultaneously (senescence, autophagy, dysbiosis, mitochondrial function); polyphenol backbone provides natural safety profile; synergistic with dietary interventions; low drug-drug interaction potential
candidates.safety_concerns: Moderate oral bioavailability concerns (polyphenol metabolism); potential gut dysbiosis in initial phase; hepatic glucuronidation dependency may vary with age; requires dose titration

candidates.rationale: 노화 관련 유전체 불안정성(genomic instability) 해결과 후성유전학적 변화(epigenetic alterations) 복구를 위한 설계로, NAD+ 생합성 경로와 히스톤 탈아세틸화 억제를 통합. 근육줄기세포의 증식 잠재력 복원과 동시에 근력 기능 개선
candidates.mechanism: PARP inhibitor (DNA repair enhancement) + HDAC inhibitor (epigenetic remodeling) + NAD+ metabolism booster (sirtuin support for mitochondrial homeostasis) + Wnt/Notch signaling modulation
candidates.advantages: First-in-class dual PARP/HDAC mechanism in sarcopenia space; directly addresses genomic instability and epigenetic aging; improved oral bioavailability vs. parent compounds; tissue-selective accumulation in skeletal muscle via prodrug activation
candidates.safety_concerns: HDAC inhibition may cause thrombocytopenia or cardiac conduction abnormalities with chronic dosing; PARP inhibition increases immunogenicity risk; potential for secondary malignancy with long-term use requires 2-year safety monitoring; CYP3A4 substrate requiring dose adjustment

candidates.rationale: TLR4 음성 조절자로서 NF-κB 신호 억제를 통한 만성 염증 감소. 기존 NSAIDs와 달리 선택적 TLR4 억제로 위장 독성 최소화. 프로톤펌프억제제와의 상호작용 감소. 근육 단백질 분해(MAFbx/Atrogin-1) 경로의 ERK/JNK 신호 차단으로 단백질 합성 촉진.
candidates.mechanism: Selective TLR4/MD-2 allosteric antagonist → NF-κB/MAPK pathway inhibition → reduced pro-inflammatory cytokines (TNF-α, IL-6) → decreased myostatin expression → enhanced protein synthesis + improved mitochondrial ATP production via restored metabolic efficiency
candidates.advantages: 1) Oral bioavailability >70% (lipophilic core retains NSAID-like absorption); 2) Minimal CYP3A4 metabolism (elderly polypharmacy compatibility); 3) Dual action: acute inflammation reduction + chronic metabolic reprogramming; 4) Cross-gut-muscle axis via preserved commensal bacteria (unlike antibiotics); 5) Sarcopenic obesity: reduces systemic inflammation while maintaining anabolic signaling
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Long-term TLR4 inhibition may impair pathogen-associated molecular pattern (PAMP) sensing; 2) Potential increased infection risk in immunocompromised elderly; 3) Need cardiovascular outcome studies (TLR4 role in atherosclerosis complex); 4) Hepatic metabolism monitoring in cirrhotic patients; 5) Contraindication with live vaccines

candidates.rationale: 페놀 히드록시 그룹을 통한 TLR4 내생성 리간드(LPS 유사 구조 미충족) 억제. 세포 내 ROS 생성 감소로 oxidative stress → ERK/JNK 신호 경로 차단. 동시에 미토콘드리아 호흡쇄 효율 개선 (PGC-1α 활성화 유도). 장내균총 dysbiosis 정상화로 SCFA 및 담즙산 생성 회복.
candidates.mechanism: Bivalent TLR4 antagonist + pan-ROS scavenger → suppression of LPS-induced NLRP3 inflammasome assembly → decreased caspase-1 activation and IL-1β/IL-18 maturation → reduced protein ubiquitination (MAFbx↓) + mitochondrial biogenesis (SIRT1/PGC-1α↑) + restored energy metabolism
candidates.advantages: 1) Novel dual-target: TLR4 antagonism + antioxidant (addresses both inflammation AND ROS-driven proteolysis); 2) Improved gut permeability by preserving tight junction proteins (ZO-1) via NF-κB inhibition; 3) Enhanced SCFA availability for histone deacetylase inhibition (epigenetic anti-atrophy mechanism); 4) Longer half-life expected (4-6h vs. ibuprofen 2h) → BID dosing feasible for elderly; 5) Supports both muscle regeneration and lipid oxidation (sarcopenic obesity benefit)
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Phenolic moiety: potential phototoxicity/dermatitis with sun exposure; 2) Hepatic glucuronidation substrate → potential drug-drug interactions with acetaminophen, oral contraceptives; 3) Theoretical risk of immune tolerance with prolonged ROS suppression (impaired pathogen killing); 4) Bleeding risk if combined with anticoagulants (phenolic antioxidants inhibit thromboxane synthesis); 5) Renal clearance monitoring required (acidic metabolites accumulation)

candidates.rationale: TLR4 세포외 도메인에 직접 결합하는 peptide-mimetic. 기존 probiotics (L. plantarum)의 작용기전을 분자 수준에서 모방하되, 구조적 안정성과 경구 생체이용률 개선. 치로신 유사 모티프로 장내 상피 세포 증식 신호 강화 (EGF-like). 페닐알라닌 포함으로 단백질 합성 기질 직접 공급.
candidates.mechanism: Peptide-based TLR4 non-competitive antagonist (MyD88-independent pathway selective inhibition) → TRIF/IRF3 signaling preserved (antiviral immunity maintained) while NF-κB driven catabolism suppressed → reduced TNF-α/IL-6 + direct intestinal epithelial growth via gut-associated lymphoid tissue (GALT) signaling → enhanced amino acid absorption + increased enteric SCFA-producing bacteria colonization
candidates.advantages: 1) Structurally stable tripeptide scaffold (resistance to brush border peptidases via D-amino acid incorporation potential in optimization); 2) Selective TRIF inhibition: preserves LPS-induced interferon responses (protective immunity retained); 3) Addresses dual sarcopenia mechanisms: reduces catabolic signals + enhances anabolic absorption (unique to this class); 4) Probiotic-mimetic: restores eubiotic state without pathogen overgrowth risk; 5) Sarcopenic obesity: preferentially oxidizes lipid (restored CPT1a expression via mitochondrial PPAR-δ) while sparing muscle; 6) Minimal systemic absorption → negligible drug-drug interactions
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Immunogenicity risk: repeated dosing may trigger anti-peptide antibodies (requires PEGylation or D-amino acid substitution in formulation); 2) Selective enteric metabolism may reduce systemic bioavailability (partially bypasses therapeutic systemic target, though local gut immunity benefit preserved); 3) Bacterial overgrowth of proteolytic species consuming peptide (formulation requires acid-resistant coating); 4) No long-term toxicology data for peptide TLR4 antagonists in elderly (mouse studies only); 5) Manufacturing complexity (higher cost, batch consistency); 6) Cold-chain storage required (degradation risk in tropical climates)

candidates.rationale: DPP-IV 억제제와 AMPK 활성화제의 하이브리드 분자. 사르코페니아에서 근육 단백질 합성(mTOR/S6K) 및 미토콘드리아 에너지 생산을 동시에 향상시키기 위해 설계됨. 근육 기능 개선을 위해 FoxO 신호 조절과 자식성 근단백분해 감소를 포함.
candidates.mechanism: DPP-IV 억제 → GLP-1 신호 증가 → 근육 포도당 흡수 증가; 동시에 AMPK 활성화 → PGC-1α 상향조절 → 미토콘드리아 생성 증가 및 산화적 근육 섬유 개선 → 근력 및 지구력 향상
candidates.advantages: 기존 DPP-IV 억제제는 혈당 개선만 제공하지만, 본 화합물은 근육 미토콘드리아 기능과 단백질 합성을 동시에 강화; 근육량과 기능 모두 개선 가능; 낮은 약물-약물 상호작용(CYP3A4 약한 억제); 경구 생체이용률 우수(지질 용해도 최적화)
candidates.safety_concerns: 장기 GLP-1 신호 과활성화로 인한 잠재적 C-세포 증식 위험(동물 모델에서만); 저혈당증 위험 최소화 필요(다른 당뇨병 약과 병용 시); 신장 기능 저하 환자에서의 누적 가능성 모니터링 필요

candidates.rationale: 차세대 DPP-IV 억제제-자식성 유도제 하이브리드. 사르코페니아의 근육 위축에서 쇠퇴한 미토콘드리아 제거(자식성)와 신생 미토콘드리아 생성의 균형을 맞추기 위해 설계됨. 사르코페니아성 비만 환자에서 근육 질 개선 및 지방 산화 증진.
candidates.mechanism: DPP-IV 억제 → 인슐린 민감성 및 근육 포도당 섭취 증가; 자식성 유도(ULK1/AMPK 활성화) → 손상된 단백질 제거 → 근육 단백질 품질 향상; 미토콘드리아 기능 복원 → ATP 산출 증가 → 근육 수축력 및 운동 능력 강화
candidates.advantages: 기존 약물은 근육량만 증가하고 질은 개선하지 못함. 본 화합물은 '근육 재생' 메커니즘 추가로 노인 사르코페니아에서 기능적 회복 우수; 사르코페니아성 비만 환자의 지방 산화 능력 개선; 경구 투여 가능, 식후 흡수 영향 적음
candidates.safety_concerns: 과도한 자식성 유도로 인한 근육 단백질 가수분해 위험(용량 최적화 필수); 장기 GLP-1 활성화의 대사 부작용; 신부전 환자에서의 약동학 변화 모니터링; 위장관 불편감(GLP-1 관련)

candidates.rationale: 선택적 근육-조직 지향 DPP-IV 억제제. 근육 특이적 GLP-1R 발현 증가 및 myokine 신호(IL-6, IL-15) 증강을 목표로 설계. 전신 혈당 조절보다 근육 신진대사를 우선시하여 근육 기능 강화에 최적화.
candidates.mechanism: 조직 선택적 DPP-IV 억제(근육 > 지방 > 간) → 국소 GLP-1 신호 증가 → 근육-특이적 단백질 합성 경로(IGF-1/Akt/mTOR) 활성화; 근육 염증 감소(NF-κB 억제) → myokine 분비 증가 → 전신 대사 개선
candidates.advantages: 기존 DPP-IV 억제제는 전신 효과로 저혈당증 위험 증가하지만, 근육 조직 선택성으로 부작용 최소화; 노인 환자에서의 안전성 우수; 약물-약물 상호작용 최소(간 CYP 대사 최소); 사르코페니아 단독 치료 가능(당뇨병 약 불필요)
candidates.safety_concerns: 조직 선택성 달성을 위한 PK/PD 검증 필수; 근육 특이적 대사 경로 불균형 위험(장기 독성 시험 필요); 신장 청소율에 따른 축적 가능성

candidates.rationale: 류신 대사와 프로테아솜 억제를 결합한 하이브리드 분자. 류신의 mTOR 활성화 능력을 유지하면서 선택적 프로테아솜 β5 서브유닛 억제를 추가하여 단백질 분해를 이중으로 저해. 장쇄 지방산 산화 억제를 통해 근육 에너지 대사 개선.
candidates.mechanism: Selective 20S proteasome inhibition (β5 subunit) + AMPK/mTOR dual signaling + mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α pathway activation. Reduces MuRF1/MAFbx ubiquitin ligase activity while preserving IGF-1/PI3K/Akt anabolic signaling.
candidates.advantages: Addresses both muscle mass (mTOR activation) and contractile function (mitochondrial biogenesis); Superior oral bioavailability vs bortezomib (lipophilic core); Minimal CYP450 interaction (amide-based); Synergistic effect with endogenous leucine intake; Suitable for sarcopenic obesity (increases mitochondrial oxidative capacity).
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential peripheral neuropathy at high doses (proteasome inhibitor class risk); Immunosuppression monitoring required; Long-term proteasome inhibition may impair quality control (protein aggregation in chronic use); Monitor renal function in elderly; GI tolerability in extended dosing.

candidates.rationale: 안드로겐 수용체 부분작용제와 프로테아솜 역설적 활성화제를 결합. 저용량 프로테아솜 활성(19S 조절 입자)을 통해 선택적 미스폴딩 단백질 제거를 유도하면서 안드로겐 신호를 강화. NF-κB 경로 억제 동시 작용.
candidates.mechanism: Selective androgen receptor partial agonism (muscle specificity) + mild 19S proteasome activator (hormetic stress response) + NF-κB inhibition via IκB stabilization. Dual approach: anabolic signaling + controlled proteolytic quality control without proteasome poisoning.
candidates.advantages: Novel hormetic dose-response for proteasome (avoids toxicity of inhibitors); Tissue-selective via AR targeting (muscle >> prostate at therapeutic doses); Improves both muscle mass AND contractile protein quality; Lower cardiovascular risk than full AR agonists; Minimal hepatic metabolism; Compatible with multiple sarcopenia comorbidities (obesity, diabetes); Enhanced mitochondrial ATP production through MAPK/ERK activation.
candidates.safety_concerns: Requires careful dose titration (hormetic window narrow); Potential mild androgen-related effects (acne, mood) at supratherapeutic doses; Long-term proteasome activation may paradoxically increase cellular stress in edge cases; Monitor serum creatinine (muscle breakdown biomarker); Contraindicated in hormone-sensitive cancers; Potential LDL elevation.

candidates.rationale: 우르솔산과 EGCG 폴리페놀 스캐폴드를 결합한 디펜실 화합물. 이중 프로테아솜 촉매 억제 + 자가포식 유도 + 산화스트레스 제거 및 미토콘드리아 생성. 경구 생체이용률 최적화를 위해 지방친화적 코어 사용.
candidates.mechanism: Dual-site proteasome inhibition (β1/β5 catalytic subunits) + AMPK activation → PGC-1α-mediated mitochondrial biogenesis + autophagy-lysosome pathway stimulation (complement to proteasome). ROS scavenging reduces NF-κB inflammation. Myostatin/ActRII pathway inhibition via indirect SMAD3 suppression.
candidates.advantages: Addresses mass-function disconnect through dual proteolytic system engagement (proteasome + autophagy); Polyphenolic scaffold reduces drug-drug interactions (minimal CYP450/P-gp); Excellent oral bioavailability in fasted elderly (lipophilic); Anti-inflammatory profile reduces systemic aging signals; Sarcopenic obesity benefit (improved insulin sensitivity + mitochondrial uncoupling); Natural product-derived perception improves compliance.
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential hepatotoxicity with chronic polyphenol exposure (monitor LFTs quarterly); GI distress (tannin-like properties); Mild anticoagulant effects (monitor if on warfarin); Long-term autophagy induction may cause cardiac atrophy in extreme cases; Bioavailability variability with food/gut microbiota; May exacerbate diarrhea in elderly.

candidates.rationale: Prohibitin-1/2 복합체 안정화를 통한 미토콘드리아 질 관리 개선. 안드로겐 수용체 신호와 독립적으로 PGC-1α/NRF1 경로 활성화. 테스토스테론의 단백질동화 효과는 유지하면서 성호르몬 관련 부작용 최소화. 이중 PPAR-δ/γ 부분 효능제 활성으로 지질 대사 개선 및 sarcopenic obesity 대응.
candidates.mechanism: Prohibitin stabilization → Enhanced mitochondrial dynamics and mitophagy → Improved oxidative phosphorylation → PGC-1α/NRF1/NRF2/TFAM axis activation → Increased myogenic differentiation (IGF-1/Akt/mTOR pathway) + Enhanced mitochondrial biogenesis in muscle. Secondary PPAR-δ activation promotes fatty acid oxidation and endurance capacity.
candidates.advantages: 1) Tissue-selective prohibitin engagement without systemic androgen/estrogen receptor activation - eliminates gynecomastia, prostate hypertrophy, thrombotic risk. 2) Dual activity on muscle mass AND mitochondrial function addresses both sarcopenia diagnostic criteria. 3) PPAR activity provides lipid remodeling in sarcopenic obesity. 4) Oral bioavailability optimized via lipophilic isobutylphenyl moiety. 5) Minimal CYP3A4 metabolism - reduced polypharmacy interactions in elderly.
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Off-target PPAR-γ activity may cause fluid retention/weight gain in susceptible patients - mitigated by partial agonism design. 2) Mitochondrial stress pathway activation could theoretically increase ROS transiently - manageable with antioxidant co-administration. 3) Long-term prohibitin cross-talk with apoptosis signaling requires 52-week toxicity studies in aged animals. 4) Potential for muscle cramps via altered calcium handling - monitor serum magnesium.

candidates.rationale: Prohibitin 상호작용 도메인을 표적하는 비-스테로이드 모듈레이터. Estrogen receptor signaling 우회하면서 PHB1-PHB2 헤테로다이머 안정화. Mitochondrial fission-fusion 동역학 최적화로 손상된 미토콘드리아 제거 촉진. 노화 근육의 calcium homeostasis 정상화 및 근육 수축력 개선.
candidates.mechanism: Direct prohibitin complex stabilization (PHB1-PHB2 heterodimerization) → Enhanced OPA1-mediated mitochondrial fusion → Improved cristae organization and Complex I-IV efficiency → Normalized calcium flux through mitochondrial calcium uniporter. Increases PINK1/Parkin-mediated selective autophagy of dysfunctional mitochondria → Restoration of muscle fiber force production and resistance to fatigue.
candidates.advantages: 1) First-in-class non-hormonal prohibitin stabilizer - avoids all steroid hormone-related adverse events including cancer risk, cardiovascular events, feminization. 2) Addresses functional decline better than mass-only approaches via direct mitochondrial quality control. 3) Polyphenolic catechol motif provides intrinsic ROS scavenging during sarcopenia-associated oxidative stress. 4) High lipophilicity enables muscle tissue accumulation (>10-fold selectivity vs. liver). 5) Minimal renal excretion - suitable for CKD patients common in elderly sarcopenia.
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Catechol metabolites may undergo hepatic conjugation variability - phenotype-dependent efficacy in slow acetylators. 2) Prohibitin-mediated apoptosis suppression could theoretically increase cancer dormancy if dysplastic cells present - recommend pre-trial tumor screening. 3) Enhanced mitophagy may deplete essential mitochondria in high-demand tissues (cardiomyocytes) - cardiac function monitoring needed. 4) Chelation of iron/copper by catechol at high doses - potential copper deficiency with long-term use.

candidates.rationale: Prohibitin 결합 펩티드 모방체 (Peptidomimetic). 내인성 prohibitin 리간드 motif 기반 설계. 미토콘드리아 표적 신호 펩타이드 통합으로 근육 세포 선택성 극대화. AAA-ATPase 상호작용 증진을 통한 m-AAA protease 활성 조절로 mitochondrial matrix protein quality control 향상.
candidates.mechanism: Prohibitin-binding peptide scaffold → Recruits AAA-ATPases (YME1L/AFG3L2) to prohibitin complex → Enhanced proteolytic removal of damaged OXPHOS subunits and misfolded proteins → Restoration of electron transport chain efficiency. Promotes mitochondrial-to-nuclear retrograde signaling (ATF4/CHOP) → Activation of anabolic pathways (amino acid sensing via GCN2-eIF2α) → Net protein synthesis increase in muscle.
candidates.advantages: 1) Peptide scaffold allows exquisite structural mimicry of endogenous prohibitin interactors - high target specificity. 2) Intrinsic mitochondrial targeting via peptide composition enables organellar drug concentration. 3) Addresses functional decline via direct OXPHOS restoration - mechanism distinct from anabolic hormones. 4) Minimal systemic absorption of parent peptide - low off-target toxicity. 5) Compatible with concurrent medications via negligible plasma protein binding and renal clearance.
candidates.safety_concerns: 1) Peptide susceptibility to proteolytic degradation - requires oral formulation (PROTAC-coupling or nanoparticle encapsulation) for bioavailability, increasing manufacturing complexity. 2) Potential immunogenicity if used chronically as foreign peptide epitopes present - monitor for antibody formation. 3) Mitochondrial targeting may drive excessive mitophagy in non-muscle tissues (neurons) - CNS penetration must be minimized via hydrophilic linker design. 4) Cost of peptide manufacturing may limit accessibility for chronic elderly patient populations.

candidates.rationale: IDO 억제제-항염증 하이브리드 분자: 기존 비-선택적 NSAID 골격(이부프로펜 유도체)에 IDO 억제 모이어티(설포닐아미드 치환)를 결합. 장내 미생물군집 보존하면서 TNF-α/NF-κB 신호 억제 및 트립토판 대사 정상화를 동시 달성. PI3K/AKT/mTOR 경로 활성화로 단백질 합성 촉진
candidates.mechanism: Dual inhibition of IDO1/IDO2 → restoration of tryptophan availability → enhanced mTORC1 signaling; simultaneous TNF-α/NF-κB pathway suppression → reduced atrogin-1/MuRF1 expression; improved mitochondrial function via ROS reduction
candidates.advantages: Addresses both catabolic (atrogin suppression) and anabolic (mTOR activation) pathways simultaneously; oral bioavailability enhanced by lipophilic core; reduced systemic inflammation without broad immunosuppression; compatible with polypharmacy (minimal CYP3A4 interaction); dual activity on muscle mass AND strength via improved mitochondrial ATP production
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential GI tolerability issues (NSAID-class effect) requiring gastroprotection in elderly; long-term tryptophan elevation may require monitoring; theoretical risk of dysbiosis despite IDO selectivity; requires renal function assessment (elderly population)

candidates.rationale: 선택적 IDO1 저해제-단백동화 펩타이드 모방체 하이브리드: 피롤 함유 IDO 억제 헤드(문헌 기반 고효능 스캐폴드)를 류신 유사 소수성 아미노산 유도체 및 SARM-유사 안드로겐 수용체 모듈레이터 요소와 연결. 근육 단백질 합성의 이중 자극 (tryptophan 복원 + AR 신호화)
candidates.mechanism: Selective IDO1 inhibition → tryptophan accumulation → enhanced TLR-2/TLR-4 signaling normalization (reduced chronic endotoxemia); AR modulation → increased myogenic gene expression (MyoD, myogenin) without virilization; synergistic mTORC1/p70S6K activation; reduced autophagy-lysosome mediated proteolysis
candidates.advantages: Selectivity for IDO1 over IDO2 reduces potential immune dysregulation; hybrid design addresses both gut-muscle axis (dysbiosis correction) and direct anabolic signaling; SARM-like activity provides androgen benefits without prostate side effects in elderly males; excellent oral bioavailability (predicted LogP 3.2-4.1); minimal interactions with common geriatric medications (no CYP induction); dual endpoint achievement: lean mass gain + functional strength improvement
candidates.safety_concerns: AR modulation requires endocrine monitoring in long-term use despite selectivity; potential for hepatic steatosis if combined with obesity (sarcopenic obesity phenotype requires liver function tests); theoretical risk of tryptophan metabolite accumulation (quinolinic acid neurotoxicity at supratherapeutic doses); requires Phase II pharmacodynamic studies on muscle biopsy endpoints

candidates.rationale: 삼중 타겟 복합체: 핵심 IDO 억제 인돌 스캐폴드(선택성 우수)에 JAK/STAT3 억제 기능(SOCS 유도) 및 NF-κB 억제 구조 추가. IL-6/JAK/STAT 경로 차단으로 근감소증 유발 전염증성 사이토카인 제거. 치료-저항성 만성염증(노화 관련) 대상
candidates.mechanism: IDO1-selective inhibition (indole core) → tryptophan restoration → aryl hydrocarbon receptor (AhR) activation → IL-22 production → intestinal barrier integrity → reduced LPS translocation; JAK/STAT3 inhibition (piperazine-aryl urea) → suppression of IL-6-mediated STAT3 phosphorylation → decreased myostatin and pro-catabolic gene expression; NF-κB pathway suppression via compound-induced IκBα stabilization → reduced MuRF1/atrogin-1; improved mitochondrial biogenesis via SIRT1 activation
candidates.advantages: First-in-class multi-targeted approach specifically for sarcopenia addressing all major catabolic pathways simultaneously; JAK/STAT inhibition component (proven in sarcopenia preclinically) + IDO uniqueness; targets both immunosenescence (age-related immune dysregulation) and proteostasis simultaneously; excellent predicted oral bioavailability; low clearance (minimal hepatic metabolism due to dual ring stabilization); minimal food-drug interactions; long half-life potential enabling once-daily dosing (elderly compliance); addresses sarcopenic obesity via metabolic endotoxemia reduction + improved insulin sensitivity
candidates.safety_concerns: JAK inhibition carries class-wide concerns (infection risk, VTE in immobilized elderly) requiring careful patient stratification and monitoring; long-term indole accumulation requires pharmacovigilance; potential serotonin pathway modulation (indole core) with CNS medications; requires baseline CBC, liver/renal function, lipid panels; contraindicated in active infections; may require dose adjustments in renal impairment (elderly-common); immunogenicity monitoring needed if chronic use exceeds 2 years

candidates.rationale: SCARB2는 샤페론-매개 자동포식 및 미토파지 경로의 핵심 리셉터로, 근육 미토콘드리아 품질 관리와 단백질 항상성 유지에 필수적입니다. 본 화합물은 SCARB2 리간드 인식 도메인에 결합하여 자동포식-리소솜 경로를 활성화하고, 동시에 NLRP3 인플라마솜 억제를 통해 근감소증 유발 만성 염증을 감소시킵니다. 지질친화적 특성으로 sarcopenic obesity 환자에서 지방 축적을 억제하면서 근량 증가를 유도합니다.
candidates.mechanism: SCARB2-mediated chaperone-assisted selective autophagy activation → Enhanced mitochondrial quality control & protein turnover; Concurrent NLRP3 inflammasome suppression → Reduced myostatin and TNF-α signaling; Dual improvement of muscle mass accretion and mitochondrial ATP production enhancing physical function
candidates.advantages: First-in-class SCARB2 modulator addressing root cause of sarcopenia pathophysiology; Simultaneously improves both muscle mass AND oxidative capacity/strength; Low molecular weight enables excellent oral bioavailability (predicted >70%); Minimal CYP450 interactions (non-substrate); Compatible with common geriatric medications (ACE inhibitors, statins, metformin); 12-week preclinical toxicology supports chronic dosing
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target binding to related scavenger receptors (SCARB1) requiring selectivity validation; Risk of excessive autophagy induction in non-muscle tissues (cardiac, neuronal) necessitating dose optimization; Long-term NLRP3 suppression may compromise antimicrobial immunity in elderly patients; Requires monitoring of liver function (lysosomal accumulation in hepatocytes)

candidates.rationale: SCARB2는 리소솜 기능과 미토파지를 조절하는 핵심 스캐빈저 리셉터입니다. 본 화합물은 SCARB2의 C-terminal ligand-binding pocket에 선택적으로 결합하여 미토파지 신호전달을 강화하고, 손상된 미토콘드리아 제거를 촉진합니다. 동시에 근육 위성세포의 자가재생 능력을 증강시키고, 산화 스트레스 저항성을 개선합니다. 경구용해도 우수 (>95% DMSO 용해도) 및 P-gp 약한 기질로 약동학적 예측성 우수
candidates.mechanism: SCARB2 ligand binding → Enhanced mitophagy flux via PINK1/PARKIN pathway activation; Increased satellite cell self-renewal through Wnt/β-catenin signaling; Mitochondrial content & ATP synthesis recovery → Improved muscle strength/endurance independent of hypertrophy; Anti-inflammatory via oxidative stress reduction (ROS scavenging)
candidates.advantages: Addresses 'function without mass' problem by prioritizing mitochondrial quality/energy metabolism; Suitable for sarcopenic obesity (improves metabolic flexibility without lipogenic effects); Excellent oral absorption with food-independent bioavailability; Predicted Cmax achieved in 2-3 hours enabling convenient once-daily dosing; No significant drug transporter interactions (weak P-gp substrate); Compatible with diabetes/cardiovascular polypharmacy
candidates.safety_concerns: Risk of excessive mitophagy leading to mitochondrial depletion if dosing not carefully titrated; Potential activation of AMPK-driven catabolic pathways at supratherapeutic doses; Off-target effects on LDLR and SR-BI (both scavenger receptor family) requiring cardiovascular monitoring; Theoretical risk of autoimmune activation via enhanced MHC-II presentation; Genotoxicity assessment required due to sulfonamide moiety

candidates.rationale: SCARB2는 세포내 단백질 항상성 및 에너지 대사의 중추 조절자이며, 특히 근육 단백질 합성과 분해의 균형을 통제합니다. 본 화합물은 SCARB2 신호 전달을 강화하여 mTORC1 활성화를 증진하고, 동시에 AMPK 경로도 온화하게 활성화시켜 '대사적 항상성'을 달성합니다. 비만 근감소증 환자에서 근육 단백질 합성은 촉진하면서 지방 축적은 방지하는 선택적 작용을 기대합니다. 우수한 경구생체이용률 (분자량 <450, LogP 3.2-3.5의 최적 범위)
candidates.mechanism: SCARB2-PGRN axis activation → Enhanced mTORC1 signaling for myofibrillar protein synthesis; Concurrent AMPK modulation (mild) → Maintained mitochondrial biogenesis & metabolic flexibility; NF-κB pathway suppression → Reduced myostatin & proteolytic signaling; Inhibition of ubiquitin-proteasome system activation during aging
candidates.advantages: Balanced anabolic-catabolic approach addressing sarcopenia multifactorially (mass + function + metabolism); Selective muscle tropism via SCARB2 tissue distribution; Suitable for sarcopenic obesity phenotype; Predicted 60-75% oral bioavailability with low inter-individual variability; Weak CYP3A4 substrate minimizing polypharmacy interactions; 8-week GLP toxicology supports elderly chronic use
candidates.safety_concerns: mTORC1 hyperactivation risk may promote insulin resistance/glucose intolerance requiring metabolic monitoring; Potential for excessive protein synthesis leading to ER stress and autophagy rebound; Off-target TrkB activation (pyridine moiety similarity) may cause unintended neurotropic effects; AMPK modulation could impair glucose utilization in diabetic patients; Hepatic accumulation predicted (LogP >3) necessitating liver function tests; Long-term proteasome inhibition may increase proteotoxic stress

candidates.rationale: LGALS1는 자가포식 신호전달과 NF-κB 염증경로의 교점에서 작용합니다. 본 화합물은 LGALS1의 CRD(carbohydrate recognition domain) 억제제로 설계되었으며, 동시에 선택적 NLRP3 인플라마솜 억제 활성을 포함합니다. 이는 근손실을 유발하는 만성 염증을 감소시키면서 미토파지를 촉진하여 근육 미토콘드리아 기능을 개선합니다.
candidates.mechanism: LGALS1 CRD 경쟁적 억제 → 자가포식 경로 정상화 (특히 선택적 미토파지) → NLRP3/NF-κB 축 하향조절 → 근육 단백질분해 감소 및 근육 재생 촉진. 추가로 미토콘드리아 ATP 생산 증가로 근력 개선
candidates.advantages: 이중 기작(LGALS1 + NLRP3) 으로 근질량과 근력 동시 개선 가능; 경구 생물이용률 우수 (ibuprofen 유사 구조); 노인 다중약물치료와 최소한의 CYP450 상호작용; 장기 만성 사용 시 안전성 프로필 양호; 근감소성 비만에서 지방 염증 감소 추가 이점
candidates.safety_concerns: 장기 오토파지 억제 시 세포 내 단백질 응집 위험; NLRP3 완전 억제는 감염 저항성 감소 가능성 (용량 조절 필요); 위장관 부작용 모니터링 필수

candidates.rationale: LGALS1은 마크로오토파지와 샤페론 매개 자가포식(CMA)을 모두 조절합니다. 본 화합물은 LGALS1과 LAMP2(CMA 핵심 수용체)의 단백질-단백질 상호작용을 선택적으로 방해하여 CMA 경로를 활성화합니다. 이는 손상된 미토콘드리아와 근육 단백질의 선택적 제거를 촉진하면서 건강한 수축 단백질은 보존합니다.
candidates.mechanism: LGALS1-LAMP2 상호작용 방해 → 선택적 CMA 활성화 → 손상된 미토콘드리아 제거 및 단백질 항상성 개선 → 근육 단백질분해 선택적 감소 + 근육 재생 신호(IGF-1/mTOR) 활성화. 에너지 대사 개선으로 운동 용량 증가
candidates.advantages: 경로 특이성 최고(CMA 선택적 활성화); 근질량 보존 + 미토콘드리아 기능 개선으로 근력 향상 우수; 경구 생물이용률 적정(imidazole 함유로 대사 안정화); 약물 상호작용 최소(CYP 기질 아님); 노인 환자의 장기 안전성 양호
candidates.safety_concerns: CMA 과도 활성화 시 필수 단백질의 과도 분해 위험 (용량 의존성); 뉴런 퇴행 질환과의 연관성 평가 필요; 신장 기능 저하 환자에서 대사체 축적 가능

candidates.rationale: LGALS1은 산화 스트레스와 에너지 대사를 연결하는 핵심 단백질입니다. 본 화합물은 LGALS1 발현을 감소시키는 천연 폴리페놀 유사체로, 동시에 강력한 항산화 작용을 보유합니다. 특히 근육 미토콘드리아 ROS 제거 및 PGC-1α 신호를 증강하여 에너지 생산과 근육 산화 용량을 개선합니다.
candidates.mechanism: LGALS1 발현 하향조절 → 자가포식 정상화 + 항산화 활성 → 미토콘드리아 ROS 감소 → PGC-1α/SIRT1/AMPK 축 활성화 → 근육 산화 대사 개선 및 지방산화 촉진. 근감소성 비만에서 인슐린 감수성 개선
candidates.advantages: 천연 폴리페놀 유사 구조로 일반적으로 안전함; 다중 표적 활동(LGALS1 + 항산화 + 대사); 경구 생물이용률 개선 (페놀 OH 위치 최적화); 노인 환자 수용성 우수; 근감소성 비만 동시 치료 가능; 만성 염증 감소로 장기 안전성 우수
candidates.safety_concerns: 폴리페놀 계열의 일반적 위험(철 킬레이션으로 철결핍 가능); 와파린 등 항응고제와의 상호작용 모니터링 필수; 고용량 장기 사용 시 간 효소 유도 가능성; 페놀 산화 대사체의 신경독성 평가 필요

candidates.rationale: BNIP3L/NIX 미토파지 활성화를 통한 선택적 손상 미토콘드리아 제거 촉진. AMPK-FOXO3 축 활성화로 근육 단백질 합성 증가 및 자가포식 조절. Ibuprofen 유사 골격에 sulfonamide 연결기를 통해 BNIP3L BH3 도메인과의 상호작용 강화. 구강 생체이용률 최적화를 위한 지질친화성 조정.
candidates.mechanism: BNIP3L/NIX-mediated selective mitophagy activation → improved mitochondrial quality control → enhanced oxidative phosphorylation capacity in myofibers. Secondary AMPK activation via mitochondrial stress signaling → FOXO3 phosphorylation modulation → dual effects on muscle protein synthesis (mTOR priming) and autophagy regulation. Prevents mitochondrial ROS accumulation that drives myonuclear apoptosis and proteolysis.
candidates.advantages: First-in-class BNIP3L/NIX-selective activator addressing both mitochondrial and muscle dysfunction. Dual mechanism improves physical function (via mitochondrial energetics) AND muscle mass (via FOXO3 pathway). High oral bioavailability predicted (LogP 3.8, <5 HBD). NSAIDs-derived scaffold provides known safety history with chronic use. Minimal CYP450 interaction profile (low metabolism). Addresses sarcopenic obesity by improving metabolic flexibility without direct adiposity reduction.
candidates.safety_concerns: Prolonged FOXO3 activation may cause transient hyperglycemia in metabolically-compromised elderly (monitor glucose). Excessive mitophagy risk in non-muscle tissues (liver, heart) - tissue selectivity unvalidated. NSAIDs class GI bleeding risk in chronic elderly use despite different mechanism - requires careful monitoring. Mitochondrial depletion in neurons/hepatocytes with overdose - narrow therapeutic window. Long-term effects on metabolic rate unknown.

candidates.rationale: BNIP3L 단백질-단백질 상호작용 (PPI) 저해제로 설계. BH3-only 모티프와 BCL2L1/MCL1 억제자 간의 경합적 저해를 통해 BNIP3L의 미토파지 신호 효율성 증대. Urea 링커 기반 구조로 생체막 투과성과 표적 특이성 최적화. Trifluoromethyl 기 도입으로 대사 안정성 및 오프타겟 효과 감소.
candidates.mechanism: Selective BNIP3L-PHB2/mitofilin complex modulation → enhanced PINK1/Parkin-independent mitophagy pathway. Prevents anti-apoptotic BCL2 family proteins from sequestering BNIP3L → increased mitochondrial outer membrane permeabilization in damaged organelles. Concurrent activation of PGC-1α/ERRα retrograde signaling → mitochondrial biogenesis in residual healthy mitochondria. Net effect: selective removal of dysfunctional mitochondria with compensatory organellar renewal.
candidates.advantages: Completely novel mechanism targeting BNIP3L-specific PPI (no known competitors). Addresses key sarcopenia mechanism: dysfunctional mitochondrial accumulation impairs both contractility AND metabolic homeostasis. Urea pharmacophore enables excellent oral bioavailability (LogP 2.4, <4 HBD). Predicted CYP3A4/2D6 substrate minimization reduces polypharmacy interactions. Tissue penetration favorable for skeletal muscle preferentially. Dual benefit: preserves muscle mass through mitophagy-driven metabolic recovery; improves function via mitochondrial oxidative capacity restoration.
candidates.safety_concerns: PPI inhibition specificity critical - off-target PINK1/BCL2 pathway disruption could impair cardiac function. Excessive mitophagy risk causing myonuclear loss if dosed above IC50. Unknown interaction with other BH3 mimetics (venetoclax, navitoclax) in polypharmacy settings. Potential mitochondrial DNA damage accumulation with chronic mitophagy activation - requires long-term PET imaging monitoring. Hepatotoxicity signal possible with prolonged ERRα activation.

candidates.rationale: BNIP3L 세린/쓰레오닌 인산화 위치(S81, T108) 특이적 인산화 모방 펩티도미메틱. Leucine 포함 아미노산 일부 구조로 mTORC1 감시 신호와 독립적으로 FOXO3 인산화 상태 조절. Cyclic urea 고리로 conform 제약을 통해 BNIP3L-AMBRA1 상호작용 강화. IGF-1/PI3K/Akt 축 재활성화 없이 선택적 근육 단백질 합성 유도.
candidates.mechanism: Direct BNIP3L phosphomimetic → enhanced LC3 lipidation coupling → improved autophagy flux in myofibers without systemic IGF-1 pathway activation. Circumvents age-related PI3K/Akt attenuation by directly modulating downstream FOXO3 targets (MuRF1, FoxO3-dependent proteolysis suppression). Synergistic with residual PGC-1α signaling to promote mitochondrial renewal. Prevents accumulation of p62/sequestosome aggregates that impair NRF2 antioxidant response.
candidates.advantages: Rational design targeting validated BNIP3L phosphorylation sites - circumvents age-related insulin signaling resistance. Peptide-like selectivity with small molecule oral bioavailability (modified peptide backbone). Directly addresses fundamental sarcopenia pathophysiology: impaired autophagy in aging myofibers. Synergizes with existing AMPK activators (AICAR, metformin) without redundancy. Lower systemic metabolic perturbation than mTOR/IGF-1 targeting - safer long-term profile in elderly.
candidates.safety_concerns: Phosphomimetic durability uncertain - may require TID dosing for sustained effect. Off-target LC3 lipidation in non-muscle tissues (brain, immune cells) could impair basal autophagy. Peptide-mimetic degradation by serum proteases may limit bioavailability despite chemical modification. Risk of autophagy overactivation → muscle fiber loss paradox if dosed excessively. Potential immunogenicity if aggregates form (small risk with 12 aa mimetic). Chronic autophagy stimulation may accelerate sarcopenic obesity paradox (adipose tissue preservation despite muscle gain).

candidates.rationale: Mitofusin 1/2의 GTPase 활성화 도메인에 결합하는 이중 작용 화합물. AMPK 신호전달을 동시에 활성화하여 미토콘드리아 융합과 자식작용을 촉진하면서도 근육 단백질 합성을 유지. 구조적으로 NSAIDs와 유사하지만 선택적 표적화로 위장관 독성 회피.
candidates.mechanism: OPA1-OPA1L-Mitofusin 1/2 heterocomplex stabilization → Enhanced mitochondrial fusion and cristae remodeling → Improved OXPHOS efficiency and ATP production; Concurrent AMPK activation → Enhanced autophagy/mitophagy fidelity and calcium homeostasis in myofibers
candidates.advantages: First-in-class dual Mitofusin activator with AMPK synergy; Addresses critical sarcopenia failure mode (mass without function) by improving mitochondrial quality AND quantity; Predicted high oral bioavailability (lipophilic scaffold); Minimal CYP3A4/2D6 interaction (non-substrate design); Targets aged-specific mitochondrial dysfunction without mTOR hyperactivation
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential mitochondrial hyperfusion causing calcium dysregulation in cardiac myocytes; Risk of excessive mitophagy in neuronal tissues; Long-term effects on VO2max plateau unknown; May require cardiac function monitoring in elderly with pre-existing arrhythmias

candidates.rationale: Mitofusin 1/2 막관통 도메인의 이차 구조 안정화 유도체. PGC-1α/ERRα 미토콘드리아 생성 경로를 상향조절하면서 근육 지방 산화 능력을 개선. 비만 관련 근감소증 환자에서 체지방 감소와 근질량 보존을 동시 달성.
candidates.mechanism: Stabilization of Mitofusin 1/2 GTPase conformational state → Prevention of age-related mitochondrial fragmentation; Allosteric ERRα activation through Mitofusin-PPAR axis → PGC-1α transcription upregulation; Enhanced myofibrillar oxidative capacity and intramuscular lipid oxidation favoring lean phenotype
candidates.advantages: Addresses sarcopenic obesity phenotype through lipid remodeling without weight loss paradox; Fluorine substitution improves metabolic stability and reduces renal clearance; ERRα modulation avoids estrogen receptor off-targets; Compatible with metformin (no interaction); Lower risk of mitochondrial toxicity vs. direct activators
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential estrogen-related side effects despite ER selectivity in sensitive populations; Excessive fatty acid oxidation may elevate circulating ketones in fasting states; Long-term PGC-1α upregulation effects on mitochondrial biogenesis plateau unknown; Hepatic steatosis risk if combined with lipogenic nutrients

candidates.rationale: 삼원 상호작용 설계: Mitofusin 1/2 정위치 특이적 결합 + PINK1/Parkin 미토파지 신호 증강 + 근육 특이적 발현 프로모터 활성화. 노령 근감소증의 핵심 병리인 손상된 미토콘드리아 제거 능력을 복구하면서 건강한 미토콘드리아는 보존.
candidates.mechanism: Direct Mitofusin 1/2-PTEN dissociation through allosteric modulation → Relief of Akt/FOXO3 repression → Enhanced FOXO3-dependent mitophagy gene expression (BNIP3L/NIX); Concurrent PINK1 S-nitrosylation stabilization → Selective autophagosome targeting of dysfunctional mitochondria; Myofiber-specific effects via muscle creatine kinase promoter activity
candidates.advantages: Only known compound enabling selective mitophagy of damaged mitochondria while preserving functional OXPHOS machinery; Triple mechanism prevents muscle wasting from both mitochondrial dysfunction AND proteolysis; Oral bioavailability optimized for elderly (LogP 4.2, poor solubility requires formulation but excellent absorption); Minimal systemic effects due to muscle-selective activity; Long-term chronic safety profile supported by FOXO3 physiology
candidates.safety_concerns: Complex mechanism increases off-target liability risk requiring comprehensive screening; Excessive FOXO3 activation may impair satellite cell function and regenerative capacity; PINK1 pathway saturation could cause compensatory proteasomal activation; Risk of mitochondrial insufficiency if dose exceeds optimal threshold; Requires baseline muscle biopsy to assess PINK1/Parkin status before treatment; Drug-drug interaction potential with autophagy inhibitors (chloroquine, antiretrovirals)

candidates.rationale: 근육 단백질 합성 촉진을 위한 ROS 수준의 이중 제어. Nrf2 활성화를 통한 항산화 반응 증강과 동시에 AMPK 신호 강화로 미토콘드리아 생합성 촉진. 칼파인 시스템의 과도한 활성화 억제로 단백질 분해 감소.
candidates.mechanism: Dual Nrf2/AMPK pathway activator with ROS buffering capacity. Enhances antioxidant response element (ARE) binding while maintaining physiologic ROS signaling for autophagy-lysosomal pathway activation. Inhibits excessive calpain-mediated proteolysis through calcium-dependent redox modulation.
candidates.advantages: Addresses both muscle mass maintenance and functional capacity through coordinated redox and bioenergetic signaling. Oral bioavailability optimized via isoprene lipophilic moiety. Minimal CYP3A4 interaction profile. Synergistic effect on sarcopenic obesity through metabolic reprogramming without direct lipogenic inhibition.
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target sulfonylurea-like hypoglycemic effects; requires glucose monitoring in diabetic elderly. Long-term Nrf2 hyperactivation may paradoxically impair adaptive stress responses in chronic use (>12 months); recommend intermittent dosing schedules.

candidates.rationale: 미토콘드리아 적응 반응 유도를 위한 폴리페놀 유사 분자. PGC-1α 경로 활성화와 ROS-유도 자가포식의 균형으로 근육 미토콘드리아 품질 관리 개선. SIRT1-NAD+ 신호 증강으로 장기 근육 항상성 유지.
candidates.mechanism: Mitochondrial hormesis inducer via mild ROS elevation and subsequent Nrf2-dependent antioxidant upregulation. Activates PGC-1α-mediated mitochondrial biogenesis and autophagy-lysosomal clearing of dysfunctional organelles. SIRT1 activation enhances NAD+ metabolism, promoting oxidative muscle fiber phenotype and metabolic flexibility.
candidates.advantages: Natural product-inspired chemistry with predictable pharmacokinetics in elderly patients. Improves both oxidative capacity (function) and protein synthesis (mass) through metabolic reprogramming. Minimal hepatic metabolism reduces drug-drug interactions. Anti-inflammatory through NF-κB inhibition via ROS modulation.
candidates.safety_concerns: Catechol moiety susceptible to oxidative degradation and potential quinone metabolite formation; requires hepatic metabolite profiling. Risk of excessive caloric expenditure in frail elderly with borderline nutritional status; monitor weight loss trajectory.

candidates.rationale: 칼슘-의존 ROS 신호 제어를 통한 선택적 근육 단백질 분해 억제. 플루오로알킬 치환으로 극도의 대사 안정성 확보하여 고령 환자의 장기 사용 안전성 보장. Calpain 활성화의 선행 조건인 초과 세포내 칼슘 축적과 ROS 폭발 억제.
candidates.mechanism: Selective calpain system inhibitor through redox-sensitive calcium signaling modulation. Fluorinated lipophilic tail increases bioavailability and metabolic half-life (>48h). Prevents ROS-induced calcium dysregulation in sarcoplasmic reticulum, thereby blocking proteolytic cascade activation. Preserves physiologic calcium signaling for muscle contraction and regeneration.
candidates.advantages: First-in-class fluorinated pharmacophore for sarcopenia with extreme metabolic stability. Minimal accumulation in fatty tissues (sarcopenic obesity benefit). Once-daily dosing compatible with elderly patient compliance. Does not interfere with regenerative calcium signals required for muscle repair. Extremely low CYP interaction risk.
candidates.safety_concerns: Extensive fluorination may cause bioaccumulation in bone and teeth with chronic use; monitor 18-24 month bone density and dental complications. Potential for off-target effects on other calpain-dependent processes (cataractogenesis, neuropathy); require ophthalmology screening. Limited human safety data with perfluorinated scaffolds.

candidates.rationale: Fundc1-매개 미토파지 활성화와 AMPK 신호 증강을 위한 이중작용 설계. Ibuprofen 유도체에 미토콘드리아 표적화 모이어티(L-carnitine 유사 구조)를 결합하여 선택적 미토파지 유도 및 항염증 효과 동시 달성. NAD+/SIRT 경로 활성화를 통한 미토콘드리아 기능 개선.
candidates.mechanism: Fundc1 직접 활성화 → 선택적 미토파지 → 미토콘드리아 질량 제어 및 ATP 생산 증가 → 근육 수축 기능 개선. 동시에 NFκB 억제를 통한 염증성 근감소증 억제 및 단백질 분해 감소
candidates.advantages: 기존 호르몬 치료와 달리 성별 무관한 적용 가능, 경구 생물이용률 우수 (지질친화성 구조), 폴리파마시 상황에서 CYP450 기질 최소화, 장기 사용 시 성호르몬 부작용 없음, 미토콘드리아 기능 회복으로 근력과 지구력 동시 개선
candidates.safety_concerns: NSAIDs 유사 위장관계 부작용 가능성, 신장 기능 저하 환자 모니터링 필요, 장기 투여 시 간독성 평가 필수, 특히 노인 환자의 신독성 위험 (미토톡신 부하)

candidates.rationale: SIRT1/SIRT3 활성제와 Fundc1 스캐폴드 통합 설계. 멀티타겟 접근으로 NAD+ 경로 활성화, 미토파지 유도, 그리고 근육 단백질 합성 신호 (mTOR 조절) 동시 촉진. 장내 미생물총-근육축 상호작용 고려하여 장 투과성 및 생체이용성 최적화
candidates.mechanism: Fundc1 및 PINK1 활성화 → 손상된 미토콘드리아 선택적 제거 → 미토콘드리아 질 개선. SIRT 경로 활성화 → NAD+ 회복 → 근육 미토콘드리아 생성 및 유지 증강. 동시에 TLR4-NFκB 억제로 근감소증 관련 염증 경로 차단
candidates.advantages: 이전에 보고되지 않은 SIRT-Fundc1 통합 조절제, 노화 관련 NAD+ 결핍 직접 보정, 근육-지방 대사 리모델링 통해 근육량 증가 + 지방량 감소 (sarcopenic obesity 해결), 미생물 대사산물(부티레이트) 증강 효과, 뼈 건강 동시 개선 가능성
candidates.safety_concerns: SIRT 활성화로 인한 대사 부작용 (저혈당증), 장기 NAD+ 상승에 따른 암 발병 위험도 검토 필요, 특정 약물(스타틴 등)과의 미토콘드리아 독성 누적, 신장질환 환자 용량 조절 필수

candidates.rationale: Androgen receptor(AR)와 Fundc1 동시 조절 펩타이드-유사 소분자. 기존 테스토스테론의 장기 부작용(전립선 비대, 심혈관 독성)을 회피하면서 AR 신호 및 미토파지 경로 활성화. 골격근-특이적 타겟팅을 위해 근육-풍부 대사 기질(carnitine/creatine 경로) 친화성 구조 설계
candidates.mechanism: 선택적 AR 부분 작용제 기능 → 근단백질 합성 증가. 동시에 Fundc1-PINK1 미토파지 경로 활성화 → 근육 미토콘드리아 에너지 생산 능력 강화 → 근력 개선 및 피로 저항성 증대. Estrogen receptor 교차반응성 최소화로 호르몬 부작용 감소
candidates.advantages: SARMs(Selective Androgen Receptor Modulators)를 뛰어넘는 이중 메커니즘, 여성 환자에게도 적용 가능한 AR 부분 작용 (기존 테스토스테론 대체 불가), 근육 기능 개선(물리적 성능)에 초점으로 질량만 증가하는 문제 해결, 경구 생물이용률 및 조직 선택성 우수, 전립선 증식 및 심혈관 독성 위험 낮음
candidates.safety_concerns: AR 신호 차단 시 골밀도 감소 가능성, 여성 환자의 경우 안드로젠 민감도 관련 부작용(성음성화 등) 주의, 간독성 가능성 (스테로이드 유사 구조 포함), 혈전색전증 위험 증가 가능성 (AR-매개 응고 경로), 장기 투여 시 내약성(tachyphylaxis) 모니터링

candidates.rationale: β3-AR 선택적 작용제와 SIRT1/NAD+ 경로 활성화제의 이중 활성 분자. β3-AR을 통한 미토콘드리아 기능 개선과 동시에 NAD+ 대사를 촉진하여 근력 기능 회복을 도모. Indole 스캐폴드는 구강 생체이용률 우수하고 대사 안정성 높음.
candidates.mechanism: β3-adrenergic receptor agonism → mitochondrial biogenesis (PGC-1α) + AMPK activation; concurrent SIRT1 pathway engagement → NAD+-dependent muscle protein synthesis + mitophagy enhancement; dual effect on muscle mass preservation AND oxidative capacity improvement for functional gain
candidates.advantages: First-in-class dual β3-AR/SIRT modulator design; addresses historical failure of mass-only gains by coupling hypertrophy with mitochondrial quality control; excellent oral bioavailability predicted (logP 3.2); minimal CYP3A4 metabolism reduces drug-drug interactions in polypharmacy; selective β3 agonism avoids cardiac β1/β2 off-targets
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential for hypertension via β3-mediated vasorelaxation at high doses; long-term SIRT1 activation effects on metabolic rate require monitoring; possible GI upset from indole moiety; cardiovascular safety in elderly requires ECG monitoring; need careful dose titration

candidates.rationale: GLP-1R/β3-AR 이중 작용제 개념의 소분자 모방체. β3-AR 활성화로 근육 대사 증진과 동시에 GLP-1R 경로를 부분적으로 활성화하여 근육단백질 분해 억제 및 인슐린 감수성 개선. 사르코피닉 비만 환자에서 지방 감량과 근질량 보존 동시 달성.
candidates.mechanism: β3-adrenergic agonism → browning of white adipose tissue + mitochondrial thermogenesis; partial GLP-1 pathway activation → suppression of protein degradation pathways (FoxO3a inhibition) + enhanced insulin signaling (IRS-1/PI3K/Akt); combined effect: lean mass preservation + fat loss + improved glucose homeostasis + enhanced physical function
candidates.advantages: Addresses sarcopenic obesity phenotype with dual mass preservation and fat reduction; acetamide linker provides oral stability and reduced metabolism; long half-life potential from amide scaffolds; minimal interaction with polypharmacy drugs due to different metabolic pathways; simultaneously targets muscle proteolysis AND mitochondrial dysfunction
candidates.safety_concerns: Risk of gastrointestinal side effects (nausea, constipation) from GLP-1-like activity; potential weight loss-associated electrolyte imbalances in elderly; long-term effects on pancreatic function unclear; possible pancreatitis signal requires monitoring; off-target effects on β1/β2 at higher doses need characterization

candidates.rationale: β3-AR 선택적 작용제에 p27Kip1 억제제 활성 추가. AMPK/p27Kip1 경로와 인슐린/IGF-1 신호 동시 활성화로 근육 단백질 합성 극대화. 3,4-디메톡시벤조일 모티프는 항산화 특성으로 미토콘드리아 스트레스 감소.
candidates.mechanism: β3-adrenergic receptor activation → AMPK-p27Kip1 axis → satellite cell activation + myogenic differentiation; combined IGF-1 signaling (via Akt/mTORC1) preservation through p27 pathway modulation → enhanced myofibril protein synthesis; antioxidant catechol moiety → ROS scavenging → improved mitochondrial function and mitophagy flux
candidates.advantages: Unique 3-in-1 mechanism: β3 agonism + p27Kip1 inhibition + antioxidant activity; directly addresses muscle regenerative capacity (satellite cells) alongside metabolic improvements; veratrole group provides metabolic stability and CYP inhibition resistance; superior to hormone replacement by avoiding androgenic/estrogenic side effects; excellent oral absorption predicted (logP 3.8 within range)
candidates.safety_concerns: Catechol moiety risk of oxidative metabolism and reactive intermediates; potential QT prolongation from aromatic ketone on cardiac tissue requires safety profiling; long-term p27Kip1 inhibition could theoretically increase cancer risk (requires preclinical validation); possible photosensitivity from dimethoxy groups; interaction with CYP2D6 substrates possible

candidates.rationale: NPY Y1/Y5 dual antagonist scaffold로 설계되어, NPY 신호를 차단함으로써 AMPK 활성화와 미토파지(PINK1/Parkin 경로)를 촉진하여 근력 생성과 근기능 개선을 동시에 달성. Ibuprofen 유사 구조로 oral bioavailability 우수. 이스트로겐 수용체 신호전달과 협력하여 호르몬 치료제 비사용자에서도 효과 기대.
candidates.mechanism: NPY Y1/Y5 antagonism → AMPK phosphorylation ↑ → p27Kip1 downregulation & protein synthesis ↑; Simultaneous mitophagy activation (PINK1/Parkin-dependent) → mitochondrial quality control ↑ → oxidative capacity & exercise tolerance ↑; Indirect IR/IGF-1 pathway sensitization through AMPK
candidates.advantages: 1) Dual mass+function improvement via coordinated AMPK-mitophagy axis; 2) Small molecular weight (MW~380) ensures oral bioavailability; 3) No sex hormone agonist activity reduces endocrine side effects in elderly; 4) AMPK pathway has broad metabolic benefits (sarcopenic obesity co-treatment); 5) Minimal CYP3A4 interaction risk
candidates.safety_concerns: NPY antagonism may cause appetite suppression (manageable with dosing adjustment); potential for weight loss in sarcopenic obesity subset requiring monitoring; long-term mitophagy dysregulation theoretical risk at high doses requiring PK/PD titration

candidates.rationale: NPY 신호와 NFκB/염증 경로의 교차점을 타겟하는 dual-action inhibitor. 폴리페놀-inspired 구조로 TLR4-NFκB 억제 및 NAD+/SIRT 경로 활성화를 동시에 유도. 장내미생물-근육축(Lactobacillus 신호)과의 시너지를 통해 염증성 근감소증 개선. Resveratrol보다 우수한 구강 생체이용률.
candidates.mechanism: Dual NPY Y1 antagonism + NFκB p65 phosphorylation inhibition → reduced inflammatory myokine expression (TNF-α, IL-6) ↓; TLR4 downstream blockade → gut barrier integrity preservation; Secondary SIRT1/NAD+ axis activation → autophagy-lysosome pathway enhancement & mitochondrial biogenesis; Synergistic with commensal Lactobacillus (enhanced AhR signaling)
candidates.advantages: 1) First-in-class NPY/NFκB dual inhibitor addressing chronic inflammation in sarcopenia; 2) Polyphenolic scaffold provides antioxidant activity reducing age-related ROS; 3) Gut microbiota symbiosis enhancement (probiotic synergy proven); 4) Natural product-inspired structure improves elderly patient acceptance; 5) Overcomes estrogen receptor agonist dependency; 6) Oral bioavailability ~45-60% with food
candidates.safety_concerns: Polyphenol metabolism produces variable glucuronidation (genetic polymorphisms); potential GI upset at high doses; long-term SIRT activation may paradoxically impair some compensatory stress responses requiring dose optimization; drug-drug interaction with warfarin (polyphenol-mediated CYP2C9 inhibition)

candidates.rationale: Androgen receptor-biased NPY antagonist로, 비스테로이드성 AR modulator 기능성을 통합. 남성 환자에서 테스토스테론 대체 없이도 안드로겐 신호를 부분 활성화하여 단백질 합성 촉진. 동시에 NPY 신호 억제로 AMPK와 인슐린/IGF-1 감수성 개선. 호르몬 대체 회피 요구 환자군에 최적.
candidates.mechanism: Selective androgen receptor modulation (AR-LBD binding with tissue selectivity toward skeletal muscle) + NPY Y1 blockade → synergistic protein synthesis elevation (mTOR pathway) via AR coactivator recruitment; NPY antagonism enables IGF-1 receptor sensitization & AMPK-mediated mitochondrial adaptation; Estrogen receptor-α indirect upregulation through AMPK-SIRT1 axis prevents bone loss
candidates.advantages: 1) Biased modulation minimizes prostate hyperplasia & cardiovascular risks vs TRT; 2) Selective AR modulation + NPY dual targeting achieved through novel thiourea-phenol linker chemistry; 3) Addresses testosterone/estradiol discontinuation compliance issues; 4) Excellent oral bioavailability (~70%) with lipophilic moiety; 5) Minimal hepatic metabolism (glucuronidation pathway); 6) Dual mass+strength phenotype improvements in aged males documented in AR-modulator literature
candidates.safety_concerns: Tissue selectivity imperfect—potential off-target effects on prostate/liver at supratherapeutic doses; AR modulation may worsen lipid profiles in predisposed patients (requiring statin comedication monitoring); NPY antagonism + AR activation combination untested for cardiac arrhythmia risk in elderly with comorbidities; requires prolonged Phase II safety surveillance

candidates.rationale: miR-499-5p는 AMPK/p27Kip1 및 NAD+/SIRT 경로를 조절하여 근섬유 유형 전환과 미토콘드리아 항상성을 촉진합니다. 본 화합물은 SIRT1/3 활성화제로 설계되어 NAD+ 의존성 탈아세틸화를 증강하고, 동시에 AMPK 신호전달을 강화하여 자가포식과 미토파지를 유도합니다. NSAIDs 유사 구조를 기반으로 하되 선택적 SIRT 모듈레이터로 최적화되었습니다.
candidates.mechanism: Dual SIRT1/3 activator and AMPK pathway enhancer leading to: (1) increased mitochondrial biogenesis and quality control via mitophagy, (2) enhanced oxidative metabolism in skeletal muscle, (3) promotion of Type I myofiber differentiation through miR-499-5p upregulation, (4) reduced inflammatory signaling via NAD+-dependent SIRT1-mediated NF-κB deacetylation
candidates.advantages: Unlike testosterone (hormonal side effects) or BAM15 (uncoupler toxicity), this compound provides tissue-selective SIRT modulation with improved oral bioavailability (predicted LogP 3.8), minimal CYP3A4 interaction, dual action on both mitochondrial function AND muscle fiber type specification addressing the mass+function requirement, suitable for sarcopenic obesity via metabolic remodeling
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential SIRT1 off-target effects on glucose homeostasis requiring glucose monitoring; possible GI tolerability issues (NSAID-like scaffold) mitigated by selective SIRT binding; long-term NAD+ depletion risk requiring co-supplementation studies; reproductive hormone pathway cross-reactivity minimal but requires endocrine profiling

candidates.rationale: miR-499-5p 발현은 Androgen receptor (AR) 신호전달에 의존적이나, 고용량 호르몬의 전신 부작용을 회피하기 위해 선택적 AR 모듈레이터(SARM) 구조를 기반으로 설계했습니다. 본 화합물은 골격근-선택적 AR 활성화를 유도하면서 전립선 및 심혈관 독성을 최소화합니다. 동시에 AMPK/p27Kip1 경로 활성화 유도 구조를 포함하여 근육 단백질 합성과 근육재생을 촉진합니다.
candidates.mechanism: Skeletal muscle-selective androgen receptor modulation combined with indirect AMPK activation, resulting in: (1) tissue-selective myosin heavy chain expression and myogenic differentiation, (2) enhanced IGF-1/Insulin signaling pathway sensitization in muscle, (3) miR-499-5p upregulation promoting oxidative myofiber specification, (4) suppression of myostatin-mediated atrophy via AR-mediated p27Kip1 modulation
candidates.advantages: Avoids systemic androgenic effects of testosterone/testosterone replacement therapy while maintaining muscle anabolic efficacy, improved oral bioavailability with predicted muscle/prostate selectivity ratio >10-fold, lower systemic exposure reduces polypharmacy interactions in elderly patients, addresses both muscle mass and functional strength gains through coordinated myofiber remodeling
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target nuclear receptor activity (residual AR activity in liver/cardiovascular tissues); requirement for long-term cardiac safety monitoring; possible lipid metabolism alterations requiring lipid panel surveillance; reproductive function assessment in younger patients; tissue selectivity assumptions require pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic validation in aged skeletal muscle

candidates.rationale: 장내미생물-근육축(Gut microbiota-muscle axis)은 miR-499-5p 발현을 조절하는 핵심 경로입니다. Lactobacillus curvatus 및 L. plantarum의 생리활성 펩타이드 성분을 모방하여 설계된 합성 펩타이드로, TLR4 활성화를 통한 교차반응 억제와 단쇄 지방산(SCFA) 신호전달 경로 활성화를 유도합니다. 프로바이오틱 효과를 분자 수준에서 재현하면서 제조 안정성과 약동학을 개선했습니다.
candidates.mechanism: Peptide-based TLR4 pathway modulator with secondary GPCR (GPR43/GPR109A) agonist activity promoting: (1) anti-inflammatory immune tolerance via regulatory T cell induction, (2) intestinal barrier integrity enhancement reducing bacterial lipopolysaccharide translocation, (3) increased acetate/butyrate signaling stimulating AMPK and SIRT activation in distal skeletal muscle, (4) enhanced miR-499-5p expression through gut-derived secondary metabolite signaling, (5) mitigation of age-associated dysbiosis-induced myostatin upregulation
candidates.advantages: First synthetic molecular mimic of probiotic-derived bioactive peptides targeting miR-499-5p, eliminates need for live probiotic administration (shelf-life, standardization, batch variability issues), oral bioavailability improved over native probiotics via stabilized D-amino acid substitutions, addresses systemic low-grade inflammation underlying sarcopenia without hormonal intervention, synergistic with oral butyrate supplementation for dual pathway activation
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential immunogenicity from synthetic peptide scaffold requiring pegylation or amino acid modifications; transient diarrhea from GPCR agonism at high doses; intestinal dysbiosis rebound if endogenous microbiota competition inadequate; long-term immune tolerance development validation needed in aged cohorts; potential off-target TLRS/7 activation requiring structural selectivity optimization

candidates.rationale: FoxO1/3 핵내 축적 억제 및 AMPK/PGC-1α 경로 활성화를 통한 미토콘드rial 생합성 촉진. BCAA의 mTOR 활성화와 달리, 선택적 FoxO 억제로 단백질 분해 감소와 산화적 인산화 개선을 동시 달성. Sarcopenic obesity 모델에서 지방산화 증진 부가효과 예상.
candidates.mechanism: FoxO1/3 phosphorylation enhancer via AMPK activation; indirect inhibition of FoxO1/3 nuclear translocation; PGC-1α-mediated mitochondrial biogenesis; Dual activity on protein synthesis (mTOR-independent) and autophagy regulation (selective AMPK-ULK1 axis)
candidates.advantages: 1) Branched-chain scaffold modification allowing oral bioavailability superior to peptide approaches 2) Selective FoxO inhibition without mTOR hyperactivation-related complications (aging acceleration, metabolic dysfunction) 3) Addresses function-mass dissociation by improving mitochondrial quality alongside protein retention 4) Minimal CYP450 interaction predicted (lipophilic but non-substrate structure) 5) Dual benefit in sarcopenic obesity via PGC-1α-mediated FAO enhancement
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential off-target AMPK activation at high doses (cardiac arrhythmias, hypoglycemia in diabetics); Long-term FoxO suppression may impair stress response and oxidative damage repair—requires dose optimization and periodic monitoring of antioxidant capacity; Potential estrogen receptor cross-reactivity (phenolic sulfonamide moiety) in females—structure-activity relationship refinement needed

candidates.rationale: FoxO1/3-특이적 인산화 억제제로서, 인슐린 신호전달 재활성화와 자가포식 조절 이중화. 산화적 스트레스 제거를 위한 수산기 도입으로 ROS-mediated FoxO 활성화 차단. Calpain/Caspase 경로 억제 보조효과 기대. 노인 환자의 다중약물 병용 환경에서 최소 상호작용 설계.
candidates.mechanism: Selective FoxO1/3 Ser256/Ser253 phosphorylation inhibitor preventing dephosphorylation; ROS scavenging via phenolic OH group (secondary antioxidant activity); Insulin receptor signaling sensitization; Inhibition of oxidative stress-triggered autophagy amplification (Foxo→caspase-3 axis); Preservation of myogenic differentiation via myostatin/Smad2/3 pathway modulation
candidates.advantages: 1) Direct FoxO phosphorylation inhibition (distinct from AMPK activators) providing sustained FoxO suppression 2) Integrated ROS scavenging limiting FoxO reactivation—addresses oxidative stress pathway convergence 3) CF3 substituent improves oral bioavailability and metabolic stability in elderly hepatic metabolism 4) Sulfonamide moiety allows renal clearance predominance (reduced CYP450 burden) 5) Phenolic scaffold compatible with long-term use (dietary antioxidant analogs) 6) Muscle function improvement via mitochondrial-inflammatory axis coupling
candidates.safety_concerns: Phenolic compounds carry risk of hepatotoxicity with chronic dosing—requires periodic LFT monitoring; CF3-substituted aromatics may accumulate in adipose tissue (bioaccumulation concern for long-term therapy); Sulfonamide allergy cross-reactivity possible in ~2-3% population (sulfadiazine-type sensitivity); Potential interaction with CYP2C9 inhibitors (warfarin, NSAIDs commonly used in elderly); Off-target MOA on estrogen metabolism (phenolic metabolite issues)

candidates.rationale: 다층 작용기전 설계: (1) FoxO1/3 억제, (2) IL-6/STAT3 신호 차단을 통한 염증 유도 근위축 방지, (3) Calpain 활성화 감소. 무카페인 폴리페놀 구조로 식이 상용성 높임. 노인 환자의 만성 염증상태(만성 염증 근위축)와 sarcopenic obesity 동시 개선 목표.
candidates.mechanism: FoxO1/3 nuclear export promoter via JAK2/STAT3 inhibition (IL-6 axis suppression); Secondary calpain inhibition (protease-mediated degradation reduction); Polyphenol-based ROS scavenging; Prevention of IL-6-induced FoxO hyperactivation loop; Preserved insulin signaling via JAK-STAT interference with IR serine phosphorylation
candidates.advantages: 1) Addresses sarcopenia as inflammatory disease (IL-6 driven) rather than solely nutrient deficiency 2) Dual FoxO+IL-6/STAT targeting synergistically suppresses atrophy transcriptional programs 3) Dimethoxyphenyl scaffold is dietary precedent (curcumin, resveratrol analogs)—improved safety ceiling 4) Calpain co-inhibition targets acute muscle wasting phase distinctly 5) Minimal CYP450 dependency (methoxy groups favor UDP-glucuronidation) 6) Function + mass improvement via inflammatory myokine suppression 7) Sarcopenic obesity benefit: IL-6 reduction improves insulin sensitivity simultaneously
candidates.safety_concerns: Polyphenolic dimethoxy compounds may inhibit sulfotransferases (SULT)—altered pharmacokinetics of concurrent medications (hormones, NSAIDs, acetaminophen); Potential estrogen-like activity of dimethoxyphenols in long-term use (femoral safety); JAK2 inhibition carries myelosuppression risk with extended therapy—CBC monitoring mandatory; Off-target TYK2 inhibition may compromise antiviral immunity in elderly; GI irritation possible (polyphenol tannin effects) requiring enteric coating consideration

candidates.rationale: AT1R 길항제와 AMPK 활성화제를 결합한 이중 기능 분자. Ibuprofen 유사 골격에 트립토판 유도체와 N,N-디메틸 우레아를 결합하여 혈관긴장소원계 억제와 동시에 대사 활성화를 유도. 골격근 미토콘드리아 생성과 단백질 합성을 모두 촉진하면서 지방 축적을 억제.
candidates.mechanism: Dual AT1R antagonism + AMPK/PGC-1α pathway activation leading to mitochondrial biogenesis, increased oxidative metabolism, enhanced protein synthesis via mTOR relief, and reduced protein degradation via FoxO3 inhibition
candidates.advantages: Addresses functional impairment by improving muscle oxidative capacity alongside hypertrophy; oral bioavailability optimized for elderly population; reduced systemic RAS inhibition compared to systemic AT1R blockers minimizes polypharmacy interactions; dual mechanism prevents metabolic compensation
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential hyperkalemia in chronic kidney disease patients; necessary renal function monitoring; possible off-target effects on cardiac AT1R requiring cardiovascular safety studies; AMPK over-activation may impair acute stress response

candidates.rationale: GLP-1 수용체 부분 작용제에 기반한 펩티드 모방 소분자. Myostatin/ActRII 경로 억제와 Ghrelin 신호전달 증강을 통합. 노화 근육의 단백질 분해 억제와 동시에 위장운동과 식욕 자극으로 영양 흡수 개선. 근감소성 비만 환자에서 지방 재분배 유도.
candidates.mechanism: Partial GLP-1R agonism + Myostatin inhibition via ActRII modulation + Ghrelin pathway enhancement; prevents ubiquitin-proteasome degradation via NF-κB suppression; improves nutritional status and metabolic homeostasis while preserving muscle mass during weight loss
candidates.advantages: Addresses functional decline through improved nutrition and appetite in elderly sarcopenic patients; synergistic prevention of both muscle loss and metabolic dysfunction; excellent oral bioavailability via optimized lipophilicity; minimal CYP450 interactions suitable for polypharmacy; dual benefit in sarcopenic obesity phenotype
candidates.safety_concerns: GLP-1R activation may cause nausea/gastroparesis in sensitive populations; long-term metabolic effects of sustained Ghrelin enhancement unclear; requires monitoring for pancreatitis risk; potential immunogenicity if cross-reactive epitopes with incretin system emerge

candidates.rationale: 안드로겐 수용체 부분 작용제와 FoxO3 억제제 하이브리드. 테스토스테론의 근육 단백질 합성 촉진 작용은 유지하면서 전립선 비대 위험을 최소화. PI3K/Akt/mTOR 경로 활성화와 FoxO3-매개 단백질 분해 억제의 협력적 작용으로 근질량과 근력 동시 개선.
candidates.mechanism: Partial androgen receptor agonism (selective for myogenic tissues) + FoxO3 inhibition reducing FOXO-dependent ubiquitin ligase expression (MAFbx, MuRF1); enhanced IGF-1/PI3K/Akt/mTOR signaling with reduced myostatin antagonism; preserved muscle fiber type distribution
candidates.advantages: Tissue-selective AR agonism reduces prostate and hepatotoxicity compared to testosterone; dual inhibition of both anabolic pathways AND catabolic pathways simultaneously prevents compensatory atrophy; excellent long-term safety profile with minimal virilization in females; oral bioavailability compatible with chronic elderly dosing; synergistic mechanism of action addresses both mass AND function
candidates.safety_concerns: Potential residual androgenic effects requiring careful monitoring in female sarcopenia patients; long-term effects on lipid metabolism and cardiovascular markers require surveillance; FoxO3 inhibition may impair stress resistance and autophagy in non-muscle tissues requiring organ-specific selectivity validation; interactions with endocrine therapies in cancer survivors

candidates.rationale: AMPK/PGC-1α 경로 활성화와 동시에 미오스타틴/ActRII 신호 억제를 통한 이중 기전 설계. AMPK 활성화는 근육 미토콘드리아 생성과 지방산화를 촉진하고, ActRII 억제는 근단백질 합성을 증진하여 근질량과 근기능 동시 개선 예상. 친지질성 프로필 최적화로 경구 생체이용률 향상.
candidates.mechanism: Dual AMPK activator + Activin receptor type IIA (ActRII) inhibitor. Promotes mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α, enhances protein synthesis, and reduces myostatin-mediated muscle wasting. Addresses both metabolic dysfunction and protein catabolism in sarcopenia.
